programme.desc: Bizarre Murders révèle une histoire criminelle vraie et étonnamment étrange. Il ne s'agit pas de tueurs en série échappant au FBI, mais de combines à la Fargo avec des rebondissements choquants et des personnages inhabituels.

programme.title: La vengeance d'une mère
programme.desc: Une étudiante soupçonne sa femme de chambre d'être la coupable d'une série d'événements bizarres qui l'ont traumatisée.

programme.title: Briseur d'os
programme.desc: Un groupe d'amis cherchant à s'amuser pendant un week-end croise par erreur le chemin du Briseur d'os, transformant leur voyage en une lutte pour la survie.

programme.title: Crimes of Passion
programme.desc: Puck Ekstedt, doctorante en littérature, est invitée par son directeur de thèse, Rutger, à passer la Saint-Jean avec lui et sa femme dans leur maison d'été sur une île isolée. Lorsqu'il lui révèle que le jeune historien Einar Bure sera également présent, Puck accepte volontiers. Lorsqu'elle arrive à la fête de la Saint-Jean sur l'île, elle trouve un groupe de jeunes gens dont les vies sont liées depuis leurs années d'études. Elle remarque rapidement un réseau de tensions entre eux, à la fois érotiques et angoissantes. Ces tensions s'accroissent lorsque Marianne Wallman, l'ancienne fiancée de Rutger, débarque à l'improviste avec sa petite amie Viveka Stensson. Le lendemain matin, Puck tombe sur le cadavre de Marianne dans les bois. Puck et Einar traversent le lac en bateau à moteur pour appeler Christer Wijk, l'ami d'Einar, chef de l'équipe nationale d'enquête sur les homicides. Lorsque Christer arrive sur l'île, le moteur du bateau tombe en panne. Il n'y a pas d'autre bateau, ni de téléphone, et ils se retrouvent tous isolés sur l'île. Le meurtrier doit être l'un des fêtards de la Saint-Jean, car il n'y a personne d'autre ici. Les soupçons de Christer se portent sur Georg Malm, un ancien amant de Marianne, mais le lendemain, il est retrouvé assassiné à son tour.

programme.title: Portrait de Criminel
programme.desc: Un regard approfondi sur la vie et les crimes de certains des tueurs les plus diaboliques au monde, dont Jeffrey Dahmer, Richard Ramirez, Cary Stayner, Leonard Lake, Dorothea Puente et bien d'autres encore.

programme.title: Bizarre Murder
programme.desc: Bizarre Murders révèle une histoire criminelle vraie et étonnamment étrange. Il ne s'agit pas de tueurs en série échappant au FBI, mais de combines à la Fargo avec des rebondissements choquants et des personnages inhabituels.

programme.title: Ma vie pour la Tienne
programme.desc: La vie de Kate est bouleversée lorsque sa jeune sœur, Melissa, disparaît. En enquêtant, Kate découvre qu'une importante somme d'argent provenant de la drogue s'est volatilisée avec sa sœur.

programme.title: Tu seras à Moi
programme.desc: Le parfait harceleur n'existe que dans l'imagination de Grace Winston, une femme qui tue son mari et utilise ensuite ce personnage imaginaire pour amener son voisin à "l'aimer et à la protéger" !

programme.title: Bizarre Murder
programme.desc: Bizarre Murders révèle une histoire criminelle vraie et étonnamment étrange. Il ne s'agit pas de tueurs en série échappant au FBI, mais de combines à la Fargo avec des rebondissements choquants et des personnages inhabituels.

programme.title: Bizarre Murder
programme.desc: Bizarre Murders révèle une histoire criminelle vraie et étonnamment étrange. Il ne s'agit pas de tueurs en série échappant au FBI, mais de combines à la Fargo avec des rebondissements choquants et des personnages inhabituels.

programme.title: Rencontres Inédites
programme.desc: Il faut que trois femmes meurent aux mains d'un tueur pour que l'inspecteur de police Michelle Eisner ait enfin une piste : les trois victimes étaient bisexuelles et clientes du callboy Lanou. Michelle n'est cependant pas la seule à traquer Lanou : son amie et ancienne amante Eva Hellmann, une journaliste agressive de la presse à scandale, la presse à scandale, la presse à sensation. En affrontant Lanou pour la première fois, Michelle ne découvre pas un psychopathe, mais un homme vulnérable et charmant qui ne tarde pas à la séduire. Eva met Michelle en garde contre Lanou, la suppliant de rester loin de lui. De plus en plus méfiante à l'égard de son amie, Michelle découvre qu'Eva était aussi une cliente de Lanou. Et lorsque la secrétaire d'Eva est également retrouvée assassinée, Michelle la fait arrêter. L'audience se transforme en triomphe pour Eva lorsqu'il s'avère que Michelle, policière, a couché avec l'accusée et le principal suspect. Michelle est suspendue et se rend chez Lanou, où elle trouve également Eva - et le tueur...

programme.title: Chasseur de monstres 2

programme.title: Cooper, un amour de chien

programme.title: Danny et la fin du monde

programme.title: Harvie et le musée magique
programme.desc: Accompagné de son chien Jerry et de sa camarade Monica, Harvie s’aventure dans la zone secrète d’un musée. - Involontairement, il ramène à la vie les marionnettes d’un musée, dont leur Maître maléfique.

programme.title: Le Royaume de dawn
programme.desc: Des royaumes de ballons, des dragons policiers et des sorciers heureux sont exactement ce dont Terry se souvient des contes fous de sa grand-mère. Sauf que tout ceci est bien réel !

programme.title: Dragon Girl
programme.desc: Sara, une jeune réfugiée en fuite, se lie d'amitié avec un jeune dragon perdu, fait équipe avec un nerd et se bat contre les administrateurs de l'école, la police et les gangs d'intimidateurs.

programme.title: En ce moment sur Box Office Action
programme.desc: Découvrez les bandes annonces des films à l'affiche sur les chaînes Box Office

programme.title: Toys and Pets
programme.desc: Une bande de bouilloires porte-bonheur embarque dans une aventure animée magique à la recherche d'un mystique légendaire.

programme.title: Marshall le miracle de la vie
programme.desc: Un garçon de 13 ans devient la cible de harcèlement dans sa nouvelle école et se sent désespéré, jusqu'à ce qu'il découvre Marshall enfermé dans une cage par un collectionneur de chiens.

programme.title: En ce moment sur Box Office Action
programme.desc: Découvrez les bandes annonces des films à l'affiche sur les chaînes Box Office

programme.title: La petie sirène
programme.desc: Une fillette de 10 ans et son jeune oncle découvrent dans un cirque une belle sirène, emprisonnée et exhibée comme un animal de foire! Ils vont organiser le sauvetage de la femme-poisson…

programme.title: Altamira
programme.desc: L'histoire de l'homme qui réalisa une découverte majeure du XIXe siècle : les grottes d'Altamira.

programme.title: Serieously Ep.23
programme.desc: Ton rendez-vous francophone préféré sur les séries, le cinéma et la pop culture en général!

programme.title: Le Cri du Faucon
programme.desc: En cavale, une petite frappe devient le coach de Zak, un jeune trisomique qui rêve de devenir catcheur pro.

programme.title: Le Livre de l'amour
programme.desc: Henry, architecte introverti, aide Millie, une ado sans abri, à construire un radeau pour traverser l'Atlantique.

programme.title: Altamira
programme.desc: L'histoire de l'homme qui réalisa une découverte majeure du XIXe siècle : les grottes d'Altamira.

programme.title: Serieously Ep.23
programme.desc: Ton rendez-vous francophone préféré sur les séries, le cinéma et la pop culture en général!

programme.title: L'Arnaqueuse
programme.desc: Peg Dahl rêve de quitter Buffalo. Elle se lance dans le recouvrement et défie le roi des chasseurs de dettes.

programme.title: Catch the fair one
programme.desc: Une championne de boxe se lance dans le combat de sa vie lorsqu'elle part à la recherche de sa sœur disparue.

programme.title: Manipulation : la voisine d'à côté
programme.desc: Un homme, impliqué dans une liaison avec la femme d’un banquier, se retrouve au cœur d’un scandale.

programme.title: The Big Ugly
programme.desc: Les relations anglo-américaines se détériorent quand des mafieux londoniens investissent en Virginie.

programme.title: Riot : Enfermé pour tuer
programme.desc: Le flic Jack Stone braque une banque de la mafia russe et finit en prison avec le tueur de sa femme.

programme.title: Massacre au Palais du rire
programme.desc: Six psychopathes s'évadent d'un asile et transforment un Halloween Funhouse en cauchemar, semant la terreur.

programme.title: Sinister Squad
programme.desc: Face à un culte surnaturel menaçant la Terre, Alice recrute des méchants de contes pour combattre la mort.

programme.title: Serieously Ep.30
programme.desc: Ton rendez-vous francophone préféré sur les séries, le cinéma et la pop culture en général!

programme.title: Swiss Army Man
programme.desc: Coincé sur une île, Hank se lie d'amitié avec un cadavre, Manny, et part à la recherche de l'amour.

programme.title: Seuls sur Terre
programme.desc: Seul survivant de l'humanité, Del voit sa solitude troublée lorsque, Grace, fait irruption dans sa vie.

programme.title: Crypto
programme.desc: Un jeune banquier de Wall Street, rétrogradé dans sa ville natale, découvre un réseau de corruption.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: Nature rude, paysages surréalistes, météo imprévisible, mais l'Islande est aussi un paradis pour les amateurs de véhicules à quatre roues, c'est la Mecque du tout-terrain en Europe.

programme.title: Peugeot 108 vs Renault Twingo
programme.desc: Peugeot 108 et Renault Twingo, les deux françaises sont assez similaires, et pourtant fondamentalement différentes. La largement moins coûteuse Peugot 108 est la voiture parfaite pour ceux qui veulent épargner leur porte-monnaie. Mais la 108 a un sérieux adversaire avec la troisième génération de Renault Twingo.

programme.title: Des Classiques "Ostalgie" de Uwe Steimle
programme.desc: Le commissaire de police de la télévision allemande Uwe Steimle présente son choix de voitures classiques de la RDA : Wartburg Camping et Skoda Felicia Cabrio.

programme.title: MOTORVISION.TV #SPOTTED
programme.desc: Le soleil est sorti, les armes sont sorties - il est temps de faire jouer vos muscles ! Aux États-Unis, les riches et célèbres profitent de leur vie luxueuse dans des voitures de sport rapides et excitantes. Les stars du cinéma aiment la Lucra Roadster de "Fast & Furious". La gloire rencontre des icônes comme la Shelby Cobra. Mais en Europe aussi, vous pouvez trouver des voitures chaudes et sauvages. MOTORVISION.TV - #SPOTTED présente les cinq cabriolets ultimes pour les chaudes journées d'été.

programme.title: MOTORVISION.TV #SPOTTED
programme.desc: Lorsque des observateurs de voitures trouvent des voitures rares, c'est comme si on gagnait à la loterie. L'une des voitures les plus exclusives au monde est la Pagani Huayra, qui n'a été construite que 20 fois. Son homologue : la Rimac Concept One, qui entre dans l'histoire en tant que voiture électrique la plus rapide du monde avec une vitesse de pointe de 355 km/h. La Lamborghini Huracan O.CT et la Jaguar F-Type d'Arden promettent une puissance de tuning brutale.

programme.title: Toyota MegaCruiser BXD10
programme.desc: Est-ce un Hummer ou un Humvee ? Ni l'un ni l'autre. Le Toyota MegaCruiser BXD10 porte le tout-terrain à un tout autre niveau.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode les cascadeurs vont pousser un quad dans ses derniers retranchements avec une violente poussée. 100 bars de pression devraient faire voler le quad.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Les cascadeurs font l’expérience de la fièvre du tout terrain tandis qu’ils s’amusent avec leurs quads. Et il y aura aussi des sauts excitants et des accidents avec des voitures volant dans les airs.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Un camion qui dérape face à un van familial contrôlé à distance. C’est la scène la plus récente que les cascadeurs doivent créer sur leur propre reproduction d’une portion d'autoroute allemande. Le coordinateur Christoph prévoit de séparer le toit du reste du véhicule. Si son idée fonctionne, l’équipe va créer une décapotable de cascade unique.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Le cascadeur Dominik Kowalski est un expert en chutes et en cascades impliquant le corps. Mais aujourd’hui, tout est différent car il doit consuire une voiture ! Son objectif est de faire une cascade en traversant un camion ! Domi réussira-t-il à prouver à son équipe qu’il est l’homme de la situation ?

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Les cascadeurs d’Action Concept doivent créer un saut en moto spectaculaire mais l’accident qui suit serait trop dangereux pour un cascadeur. Le coordinateur Ramazan Bulut doit trouver une solution, l’équipe développe donc un cannon pour la moto. Aura-t-il assez de puissance pour propulser la moto comme souhaité ?

programme.title: Glemseck 101
programme.desc: Une fois par an, les amateurs de café racers, de motos anciennes et de nostalgie se réunissent à Glemseck 101 à Leonberg, en Allemagne - le plus grand événement d'Europe pour les passionnés de moto et les motards.

programme.title: Honda CB 1100 EX
programme.desc: Les années 1970 sont de retour. Depuis des années, la nostalgie des motos se répand dans le monde entier. Honda a autrefois produit la première moto à quatre cylindres, la CB 750 Four. Aujourd'hui, les Japonais invoquent leur tradition avec la CB 1100 EX.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Aux États-Unis, les SUV ne sont pas considérés comme de simples outils de travail plutôt comme des véhicules de tous les jours. Les Américains apprécient la place, le confort et la capacité de chargement. Leur devise : plus c’est grand, mieux c’est. Chevrolet Suburban, Jeep Cherokee, GMC Yukon, nous vous faisons découvrir le monde des tout terrain américains.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Les SUV sont plutôt impressionnants en sortie d'usine, mais il y a de nombreuses possibilités de modification et de personnalisation : grosses roues, couleurs folles ou puissance de voitures de sport. On pourrait se demander si de telles modifications sont réellement nécessaires, mais les amateurs adorent. Voici la BMW X5 Kelleners, la Mercedes Brabus B63 et le Porsche Cayenne préparé par Techart

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: Petit, puissant, et plein de style
programme.desc: Au premier regard, les voitures compactes comme l'Audi A1, la Volkswagen Golf et la Mini sembleraient ne par appartenir à ce segment, mais lorsque la "A1" devient la "S1", et la Golf ajoute un "R" à son nom, ces petites voitures deviennent des bêtes à transmission intégrale. Ensuite, la Mini Countryyman est rajeunie. Et enfin, un essai du succès commercial qu’est la Volvo XC60.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Au "All-Wheel Adventure" en Allemagne, la plus grosse exposition de tout terrain en Europe, nous essayons le Rallye Defender et observons comment une Jeep Wrangler classique, avec quelques modifications, peut valoir le double de son prix. Ensuite, nous testons la petite Fiat Panda 4x4 sur les routes islandaises. Enfin, le Bowler Defender de Land Rover et la Laplander à 6 roues de Volvo.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: En hiver, lorsque les routes deviennent glissantes, un véhicule à transmission intégrale a de nombreux avantages du fait du gain en adhérence. Nous avons passé une journée enneigée en Autriche avec le pilote de rallye Niki Schelle à bord d'une Suzuki SX4 S-Cross. Pourquoi la Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution est-elle parfaite pour le drift ? Et enfin Mercedes et Chrysler présentent leurs concept cars.

programme.title: Glemseck 101
programme.desc: Une fois par an, les amateurs de café racers, de motos anciennes et de nostalgie se réunissent à Glemseck 101 à Leonberg, en Allemagne - le plus grand événement d'Europe pour les passionnés de moto et les motards.

programme.title: Datsun 240 Z Sport Coupe & Fairlady Roadster
programme.desc: La 240 Z Sport Coupe marque l’arrivée parmi les grand pour la firme japonaise. Cette voiture de sport soignée succède directement à la "Fair Lady". Au Japon, elle porte toujours ce nom. En comparaison de l’extravagante "Lady", la 240 Z est plus élégante. Elle a été conçue principalement pour le marché américain.

programme.title: Going Pro
programme.desc: Une équipe de course ne se contente pas de piloter ; elle doit aussi faire face aux incertitudes et aux pressions liées à l'obtention des sponsors et du soutien financier indispensables pour continuer à participer au championnat.

programme.title: Going Pro
programme.desc: In the season finale at Hockenheim, tensions are high as teams compete for the ADAC GT4 championship. Defending champions Mike David Ortmann and Hugo Sasse face intense pressure after a challenging start to the season.

programme.title: Going Pro
programme.desc: Damon Surzyshyn embarks on a new chapter in his racing career, navigating ice racing in Canada before securing an opportunity to compete in Germany’s Nürburgring NLS series. Despite some challenges, he prepares for the legendary Nordschleife.

programme.title: Going Pro
programme.desc: Damon Surzyshyn takes on the Nürburgring Nordschleife, navigating the complexities of permit qualifications, unpredictable weather, and intense multi-class racing. Amidst several challenges, he pushes through to secure a strong finish.

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.desc: Marco, un hambourgeois fan de Porsche réalise son rêve : une Porsche 911 Coupé de 1984 ! Avec l’aide de Big Mike, un concessionnaire de Los Angeles, il trouve la voiture de ses rêves à San Francisco. Mais ce n’est que le début de son aventure : il visite les collections Del Beste Cobra et Mustang. Et il profite aussi d'un aperçu incroyable du Rêve Américain du V8 dans l'atelier de Carol Shelby.

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.sub-title: Motor Stories - Magnus Walker - Los Angeles
programme.desc: Lors de son voyage à travers l’ouest des États-Unis, Marco rend visite au ''bandit'' de chez Porsche Magnus Walker. Le designer pionnier et icône en terme de style ne lui montre pas seulement sa collection, il le persuade aussi de participer à une course à travers Los Angeles.

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.desc: En route vers Las Vegas, Marco lâche Big Mike dans une zone isolée du désert profond de Californie, dans la Apple Valley. Ensemble, ils retrouvent les étranges amis de Big Mike de la famille Lowdown Kustos, d'anciens pionniers du tuning automobile Californien.

programme.title: Arabella Classics
programme.desc: Des raretés automobiles dans un paysage de rêve. L'Arabella Classics, l'un des rallyes de voitures classiques les plus exclusifs d'Europe.

programme.title: Une Coccinelle avec beaucoup de puissance
programme.desc: Une Volkswagen Beetle au look des années 1970 et aux réglages contemporains. 90 ch et une vitesse de pointe de 180 km/h promettent un plaisir de conduite sans fin.

programme.title: MOTORVISION.TV #SPOTTED

programme.title: FIM EnduroGP World Championship
programme.desc: The first round of the 2024 EnduroGP is the GP of Portugal, taking place in Fafe.

programme.title: FIM EnduroGP World Championship
programme.desc: The teams and drivers again gather in Portugal for Round 2 of the 2024 EnduroGP, this time in Valpacos.

programme.title: FIM EnduroGP World Championship
programme.desc: Round 3 takes the competitors in the 2024 EnduroGP to Romania, to the town of Bacau.

programme.title: FIM EnduroGP World Championship
programme.desc: It's Round 4 of the 2024 EnduroGP, and stakes are high in Bettola, Italy.

programme.title: FIM EnduroGP World Championship
programme.desc: The fifth round of the 2024 EnduroGP is the GP of Slovakia in Gelnica.

programme.title: FIM EnduroGP World Championship
programme.desc: The town of Rhayader in Wales hosts the sixth round of the 2024 EnduroGP.

programme.title: FIM EnduroGP World Championship
programme.desc: The competing teams make their way to Rioude in France for Round 7 of the 2024 EnduroGP.

programme.title: Jaguar XF S - La classe business au charme britannique
programme.desc: La nuit tombe-t-elle maintenant sur les berlines allemandes ? Un Britannique agressif devient sérieux. La Jaguar XF est la voiture d'affaires alternative aux modèles allemands établis. Et en version S, elle est même très amusante.

programme.title: Maserati Quattroporte GTS
programme.desc: En 1963, il y a plus de 50 ans, Maserati a inventé un nouveau genre de véhicule avec la Quattroporte : la berline sportive. La sixième variante du modèle offre également les qualités bien connues de la marque.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: Episode special : Journees d’essais aux 24h du Mans
programme.desc: Deux semaines avant le début de la célèbre course des 24 heures du Mans, toutes les écuries se retrouvent pour tester leurs voirures sur le mythique long tracé Français. Intempéries, accident et beaucoup de tension, nous vous faisons vivre les journées d’essais officielles des 24 Heures du Mans 2013.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: La Porsche 911 est sans doute la plus discrète des voitures de sport au monde. Pas de fanfaronnade, pas de look exotique, et la performance avant tout. Nous découvrons l’histoire de cette voiture de sport iconique et les raisons d’un tel succès depuis plus de 50 ans. Ensuite, la Porsche Turbo S, le modèle phare de la série 911 proposé par la marque.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Nous avons emmené la Mercedes AMG SLS sur un aérodrome et la Porsche 911 Turbo S sur un circuit, afin de voir ces bêtes de sport en action et de tester leurs performances. Ensuite, l’Audi R8 4.0 TFSI et sa technologie d’éclairage innovante.

programme.title: Glemseck 101
programme.desc: Une fois par an, les amateurs de café racers, de motos anciennes et de nostalgie se réunissent à Glemseck 101 à Leonberg, en Allemagne - le plus grand événement d'Europe pour les passionnés de moto et les motards.

programme.title: BMW M3 E30 – La BMW la plus appréciée de tous les temps
programme.desc: À la fin des années 80, BMW a mis sur le marché une voiture dont la course était l'ADN. Conçue au départ comme un modèle d'homologation pour le Deutsche Tourenwagen Masters, le DTM, elle est finalement devenue l’une des voitures de sport les plus appréciée. Lorsqu’on invoque son nom, les fans de voiture en ont des frissons encore aujourd’hui : la BMW M3.

programme.title: Going Pro
programme.desc: Une équipe de course ne se contente pas de piloter ; elle doit aussi faire face aux incertitudes et aux pressions liées à l'obtention des sponsors et du soutien financier indispensables pour continuer à participer au championnat.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers assist a bondsman after a fugitive and his girlfriend refuse to surrender. An officer pulls over a teen who attempts to ingest a bag of marijuana while the officer isn’t looking. An officer makes an arrest after the female suspect has an outstanding warrant.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A fleeing vehicle goes for a spin when officers execute a perfect PIT maneuver. Cops try to flush out a suspect who barricades himself inside a donut shop. Officers hit the meth mother lode when they stop a truck in a downpour.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A stolen vehicle pursuit ends in a take down and recovery of additional evidence. A store employee flags down an officer who steps in to make a theft related arrest. An officer is accompanied by several units in pursuit of a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An out-of-control woman needs to be subdued after an arrest. Deputies spot an erratic driver who appears to be under the influence. A car is seen driving backwards on a one-way street.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a fight between a daughter’s boyfriend and her mother. A woman lights candles after an attempted break-in. Police respond when an evicted tenant tries to reenter his old apartment.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies prevent the delivery of a pillow stuffed with drugs. A disabled woman calls the law when a father and son get into a fist fight. Deputies confront an intoxicated man riding a bike.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An inebriated man is arrested for peering through the window of a recovery center. After a foot chase, officers bring down a local felon. Police respond to a domestic dispute at a mobile home park.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man who ran from police complains that he was not read his rights. Officers detain kids who threw rocks at windowfronts. A paranoid man claims he is being chased by drug dealers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies search for a man who ran from a traffic stop. A man being pursued tells officers he was going to his mother’s house. A drunk driver won’t admit to hitting a car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A drunk man threatens both firefighters and the police. Police are called over a dispute regarding an alleged missing dog. A drunk driver changes his story when his friend is found pinned under his car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: During an arrest, a suspect decides to pop the question to his girlfriend. An abandoned house becomes the target of burglary. Two brothers’ dispute over a business matter leads to violence.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An officer wrestles a squirrely meth user who thinks he’s the Incredible Hulk. Cops catch a drug-carrying sprinter when he runs out of gas. A belligerent suspect doesn’t take kindly to having his socks removed.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a buy-bust sting operation. An elderly man is questioned after reportedly kicking a juvenile in the face. A man is shot in the head by his roommate.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police work a sting that targets drug dealers. An undercover sting discovers narcotics trafficking. Police respond to a burglary in progress and discover a flop house.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Detectives find a loaded gun while searching a vehicle. Local residents complain about a loud neighbor. A man is spotted walking down a road with a saw.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers arrest a suspect hoarding drugs inside a motel room. A driver admits to drug and alcohol use after being pulled over. Officers assist in the search for a runaway child.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers stop a man riding a bicycle in the middle of the street with no backlight. Suspects have a fun night out in a neighborhood known for drugs. Officers are dispatched to help a woman when her boyfriend threatens her with a brick.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies detain a man when a gun falls from his pantleg. Deputies are called when a father spits on his son’s girlfriend. Officers respond when a child is bitten by two large dogs.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers respond to a threatening man with a weapon. A man gives Officers a false name forgetting he’s wearing his name tag. A suspect in a stolen car collides with another vehicle then flees on foot.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A driver takes several units on a reckless journey driving on the wrong side of the highway. Officers set up a reverse sting operation to capture a suspected drug dealer.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A patrolman plays linebacker when a fleeing thief runs right into him. Armed-robbery victims give a colorful play-by-play on surveillance footage of the crime. Officers have to get tearful children back to their estranged mother.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers rescue a man from a rushing river. A suspect taunts officers during a slow-speed chase. Officers assist a rescue team with extraction from a car. An officer assists in an apartment fire.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers are assaulted by the brother of a suspect who is resisting arrest. A resident sprays water on his neighbor’s noisy dogs. Officers recover drugs and cash after pulling over a motorist.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: US Marshals are tasked with finding a young boy that has been kidnapped for ransom. A man suspected of dealing contraband is reported by his ex-girlfriends mother. Officers raid a home looking for a dangerous fugitive.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers apprehend a man in possession of stolen property brandishing a rifle. Officers respond to a call of brothers in a fist fight. Police intervene when a couple argues in the middle of the street.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers arrest a female driver for drug possession and whose mother scolds her before she’s carted off to jail. An officer arrests a man who alleges that he’s waiting for his date for outstanding warrants and a stolen vehicle. An officer takes a known prostitute to jail.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A woman stuffs drugs into her under garments. A mother attacks her daughter because she got married in Vegas. Officers are called when a woman is accused of stalking her friend.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suicidal man tries to taunt police into shooting him. Undercover officers expose an illegal operation at a pain management clinic. A woman claims she’s just a bystander to a motorcycle hit and run.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A kind man gets more than he bargained for from his new roommate. Cops discover the unexpected consequences of punching a scooter. Officers stop a sober suspect who may not be from the same planet as them.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers pursue a man who attempted to cash a bad check then fled the scene. Police are called when a man’s ex-girlfriend breaks into his house. Police chase an unlicensed teen speeding in a vehicle

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man needs police assistance when his angry ex-girlfriend crawls through his window. Police must play hide-and-seek when they attempt to execute an arrest warrant. A man is threatened with violence when he refuses to turn his car’s headlights off.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers respond to an armed robbery and carjacking, the suspects are arrested on several charges. A concerned sister reports a fight between her brother and a heavyset burglar. Officers pursue a stolen vehicle and a high speed chase ensues which ends in a wreck.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Unhappy about getting stopped for drinking while biking, a man takes off on foot. A woman in her PJs doesn’t know how she wound up in a stolen vehicle. Officers discover a couple smoking Meth in front of a young child.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A passenger bails from a fleeing stolen vehicle then claims that he was only getting a ride. An undercover officer pulls a sting on a handsy prostitute. An anxious lady gets nabbed for weed after calling the police on her quarrelsome husband.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers discover a grand theft auto suspect hiding in his apartment. Officers assist the fire department in capturing a brown bear from a palm tree. Officers respond to a shooting.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers engage in a high-speed chase with a motorcyclist. A man becomes verbally abusive with a woman and her mother after a boating trip. Police seize a rifle and 20 rounds of ammo from a man.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call of a woman holding a loaded gun to her head. Officers kick in a door to halt an assault in progress. A woman driving a stolen vehicle claims it was purchased by a friend.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A chase ends after one of the police units disables the vehicle. An officer responds to a domestic dispute between a mother and her son. Officers attempt to pull over a vehicle with expired tags.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A husky cyclist takes a spill when he tries to flee. Officers chase a suspect in a stolen car who says he was just fixing it for a friend. A man's denials of drug use lose credibility when cops find a meth pipe in his vehicle

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A K-9 unit assists on a motorcycle pursuit turned foot chase gone awry. Officers investigate after noticing the garage door to an auto body shop is open. A pursuit involving a stolen vehicle driving on the wrong side of the freeway ends with an arrest.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A woman hides in her apartment after she skips out on paying her cab fare. A knife fight results in multiple calls to the police for help. A French tourist get a bus ride from Hell in Florida.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police use convenience store footage to make an arrest for burglary. Police attempt to help two neighbors reconcile their differences. Officers arrest a woman for domestic violence.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers dispatch the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspect who flees on foot. A suspicious male walking down the street is arrested with a large bag containing stolen goods and drug paraphernalia. A man is arrested in a stolen car containing drugs and a firearm.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A foot pursuit ends in arrest after a suspected drug dealer attempts to discard his goods. Police are called to a warehouse after the security guard is held at gunpoint. Police assist a young girl after being struck by a car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police respond to an emergency call and find a man in dire trouble. Deputies respond to an abusive husband at a local eatery. Two women try to buy narcotics from an undercover deputy during a sting.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A couple flees a routine traffic stop. An intoxicated woman climbs a tree. Construction workers are pulled over for a hand-to-hand transaction.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A woman tells Officers she’s a vampire. Officers question a colorful man dressed as a woman. A violent woman screams obscenities at Officers and needs to be restrained.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Cops attempt to piece together whether or not an erratic driver is in a stolen vehicle. A knife-wielding man complains that rude neighbors won’t stop smoking pot. Officers come upon an emotional man with a blade to his throat.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A hit and run call results in the intoxicated suspect being coaxed out of his car at gun-point. Officers respond to a stabbing and the victim is rushed to the hospital by paramedics. Officers give a tour of a newly renovated jail in Maricopa County, AZ.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man sneaking away from a bar fight claims he was chased by a truck. Deputies are called when a woman assaults people at a skating rink. A drunk man abandons his truck on train tracks.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Undercover Officers organize a buy-bust sting. Racoons hide out in a woman's chimney. A man gets pulled over for soliciting a prostitute.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A decoy vehicle is strategically abandoned in a public parking lot. An officer responds to a burglary in progress at a tire store. Officers respond to a domestic call at a nearby trailer park.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers detect a strong odor of marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A woman tells Officers her inebriated boyfriend smashed a window. Police investigate a suspicious vehicle parked behind a cemetery.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Two cousins fight over a five dollar debt. Police arrest a man for domestic violence. A taxi cab driver is robbed and shot.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Three men are apprehended for solicitation. Officers respond to a domestic violence call at an apartment complex. An officer discovers a teenager is dating an older man.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.sub-title: Look at the Princess: I Do, I Think
programme.desc: A quick turn of events sees Crichton chosen as the unwilling groom-to-be in the upcoming royal wedding.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.sub-title: Look at the Princess: The Maltese Crichton
programme.desc: Someone removes Crichton's head from a statue; Aeryn examines her choices; Zhaan faces a Moya builder.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: A crew member falls prey to a shape-shifting parasite and the rest of the crew must locate it before it is too late.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: Crichton becomes a mental slave on a commerce planet and must trust his greatest enemy, Scorpius, to help him see the truth through the illusions.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: The crew races to save Crichton after contact with a Hyper Stream of Time speeds up his aging process.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: The crew faces death after a Plokavian ship meets its fate under suspicious circumstances. With Ben Browder.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: Chiana's unknowing part in the Nebari scheme to control a portion of the galaxy is revealed after they take over the Moya.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.sub-title: Liars, Guns and Money: A Not So Simple Plan
programme.desc: Stark plans to rob a less-than-reputable bank to get them money for a sizeable purchase of slaves, but things don't quite go the way he thought.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.sub-title: Liars, Guns and Money: With Friends Like These
programme.desc: Infected currency from the Shadow Depository threatens the crew of the Moya as they decide how best to rescue D'Argo's son.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.sub-title: Liars, Guns and Money: Plan B
programme.desc: The crew of the injured Moya must rely on the help of disorganized mercenaries to save Crichton from Scorpius.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: An alien surgeon comes to the aid of Crichton, removing the control chip from his head and healing the Moya.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: The Moya's crew must quickly recover from their last adventure because Scorpius is up to his old tricks.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: An outrageous love triangle ignites dangerous sparks aboard a space station, where the crew find themselves trapped during a powerful interstellar storm.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: Crichton learns the elusive technology that could allow him to return home to Earth, but while he is preoccupied with the consequences a crew member unsuspectingly nears death.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.sub-title: Self-Inflicted Wounds: Wait for the Wheel
programme.desc: A crew member must volunteer to stay behind to guide the sabotaged ship, knowing that it will soon be atomized.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: The crew goes back in time at an ancient battle site. With Ben Browder and Claudia Black.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: D'Argo, Chiana and Jool (Anthony Simcoe, Gigi Edgley, Tammy MacIntosh) are preyed upon by brain-sucking aliens and corpse-eating Xarai.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: The crew must travel to a warring planet to obtain medicine for Talyn, who was injured in a skirmish with a Peacekeeper Retrieval Squad.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: A giant Budong swallows the crew. With Ben Browder and Claudia Black.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: Parasitic Energy Riders hitch a ride on Moya, planning to plant themselves inside the bodies of the crew.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: The Peacekeeper Retrieval Squad finally reveals its true mission when it confronts Crichton and his crew.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: Scorpius (Wayne Pygram) risks it all when appealing to Crichton (Ben Browder) for an alliance by revealing his shrouded past.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: Crichton's ship suddenly begins flying toward the sun and he, along with crewmates Aeryn and Crais, battles to override its compulsion.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: Crichton and his crew take a cruise on a "pleasure planet," but it turns out to be more of a pain than they bargained for.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: A dangerous species unlocks the long-held secrets to wormhole technology, unleashing the fury of the Ancients.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: Crichton and Aeryn race to construct the ultimate weapon in order to survive an attack by the Scarrans.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: A strange ship bent on self-destruction targets Moya and with Crichton in a coma, D'Argo has to save the day.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: Aeryn yearns to contact her father when the crew lands on a planet laden with mystics, seers and also frauds.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: A movie star escapes from the Hollywood madness in Shady Rest.

That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: Rackades

programme.title: Mistress for Hire
programme.desc: Skylar works as a professional mistress hired by women for divorce leverage. When she finds herself falling for her target, Eric, she questions her career and her motives. But when Eric’s wife, Octavia, won’t allow Skylar to destroy her plans, and a dangerous game of cat and mouse ensues, with love and survival on the line.

programme.title: Back Home
programme.desc: Drug kingpin Jay looks to expand his drug empire with the help of his business partners, and his girlfriend Passion. However, Polo and Marco have their own agenda’s, which could lead to chaos, as a potential drug war descends upon Atlanta.

programme.title: Troublesome
programme.desc: Veteran homicide detective Michael reluctantly partners with rookie Derrick. Witnessing a double homicide, they survive a deadly chase, but Derrick is wounded. The suspects are linked to the kingpin, who retaliates by ordering murders across the city. As chaos erupts, the FBI joins the case, revealing the kingpin's identity. Michael finds a weak link, offering a chance to finally catch him.

As murders and violence swirl around her, she wonders who she can trust. Will she find love or suffer the same mysterious fate as her birth parents?

The women respond accordingly in order to get justice for their friend.

programme.title: The Queens Court

It gets worst when Erin and her gang interfere in situations with Tracey and Kandi. That's when Tracey takes matters in her own hands.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Latoya is worried that her sister Tenielle’s boyfriend Ashley is molesting Tenielle’s 4 year old daughter! Latoya and the child’s father Antonio are here because they demand Ashley prove his innocence with a lie detector test!

programme.title: Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.sub-title: I Got a Bad Feeling About This

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Christopher had to move away for a job and his wife, Ashley, says that she won't move until he proves that he's not a cheater. Then, Tim is worried that his wife Sasha is cheating because he found Facebook messages from her ex.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Valarie is here to get custody of her children because she says their father Roy has been abusing them. Roy says that it's her boyfriend who is the abuser. Then, Jennifer is here to because she want's her sister Amber to leave her boyfriend Ceasarae.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.sub-title: A Father's Fight for His Daughter

programme.title: Rope
programme.desc: Two men try to convince themselves they've committed the perfect murder by hosting a dinner party after strangling a former classmate to death.

programme.title: Cannibal Tick
programme.desc: A retired vampire hunter comes to the States to visit his twin brother. Unbeknownst to him, the small backwoods town where his brother lives and the people in it are being overrun with ticks that have been injected with a toxic chemical compound. The bites from these ticks have an unfortunate side effect, they turn people into blood thirsty zombies.

programme.title: Hot Tub Party Massacre
programme.desc: The sisters of the Delta Omega sorority won a free weekend at a luxurious hotel & spa. They planned on having a fun and steamy weekend. However, things go from steamy to bloody when an escaped serial killer checks in to the hotel and crashes their party. The heat will be on at the HOT TUB PARTY MASSACRE!!!

programme.title: The Sect
programme.desc: Kalima, a young foreigner just arrived in Buenos Aires, attends a job interview, without suspecting that the job is with a mysterious sect working in the human trafficking business.

programme.title: Wounded Warriors
programme.desc: Wounded Warriors - DMP - PP WWLXEX8CGTH Wounded Warriors

programme.title: Muñeca de Trapo
programme.desc: Es una serie repleta de ternura y amor que nos invita a conocer el mundo a través de los ojos de una encantadora niña de cuatro años, quien nos hará reír y llorar. A pesar de su corta edad, también nos llevará a reflexionar, pues en cada capítulo se transmite un hermoso mensaje que enseña a los niños y hace un poco mejor a los adultos. Muñeca de Trapo es huérfana de madre y vive con su padre y su abuelita. Carlos Alberto, su padre, es un joven ejecutivo de grandes ideales y un corazón bondadoso, que adora a su hija y desea lo mejor para ella. Tal vez por este amor tan profundo, nunca se ha vuelto a casar. Doña Juanita, la abuela, vive por su hijo y su nieta, dedicando todos sus cuidados y mimos para que en su hogar siempre reine la felicidad y la armonía. En Muñeca de Trapo, también disfrutaremos de las travesuras de los amiguitos del barrio, quienes, junto a ella, vivirán las más diversas y divertidas aventuras.

programme.title: Hechizo de Amor
programme.desc: Ligia Valderrama (Emma Rabbe) es la hermosa y engreída hija de una familia adinerada que vive en la capital. Pero existen secretos que yacen bajo la fachada de una familia feliz. La mujer que ella considera su madre no es la que le dio la vida, y su verdadera madre está internada en un manicomio. A algunas horas de camino del hogar de Ligia vive otra bella mujer con un pasado diferente. Ella es una pobre huérfana criada por una pareja que la adoptó cuando sus padres murieron. Ambas mujeres conocen y se enamoran de los hombres de sus sueños, pero a ninguna se le permite casarse. En cambio, ambas parejas son obligadas a separarse y por un tiempo pareciera que ambas jóvenes se casarían con la pareja de la otra.

programme.title: Las Amazonas
programme.desc: Emiro Lizárraga es un ambicioso y orgulloso propietario de un rancho de caballos llamado Amazonas. Emiro obtuvo su fortuna por medios ilegales, y tiene tres hijas Isabel, Carolina y Eloísa, además de haberse casado recientemente con su secretaria Elvira, una mujer coqueta, calculadora y ambiciosa. Las niñas no se llevan bien con la nueva esposa de su padre, lo que provoca conflictos. Isabel, la hija mayor, se siente atraída por Rodrigo, un joven veterinario divorciado y con dos hijas

Las niñas no se llevan bien con la nueva esposa de su padre, lo que provoca conflictos. Isabel, la hija mayor, se siente atraída por Rodrigo, un joven veterinario divorciado y con dos hijas

programme.title: Las Amazonas
programme.desc: Emiro Lizárraga es un ambicioso y orgulloso propietario de un rancho de caballos llamado Amazonas. Emiro obtuvo su fortuna por medios ilegales, y tiene tres hijas Isabel, Carolina y Eloísa, además de haberse casado recientemente con su secretaria Elvira, una mujer coqueta, calculadora y ambiciosa. Las niñas no se llevan bien con la nueva esposa de su padre, lo que provoca conflictos. Isabel, la hija mayor, se siente atraída por Rodrigo, un joven veterinario divorciado y con dos hijas

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Rosa le dice a Leonardo Alfonso todo lo que le dolió que él no creyera en ella. Andreina y Anselmo se pelean por traicionarse y no ir presos. Raúl y Santa planean como transferir todo el dinero de Anselmo a las Islas Caimán y quedarse con todo su fortuna. Rosa le dice a Andreina que Miguelito volvió a la casa, Leonardo Alfonso no entiende nada. El niño dice que Rosa lo busco en el aeropuerto y que Andreina se lo llevo de la casa y lo dejo olvidado en un centro comercial. Rosa no soporta que Leonardo Alfonso la haya traicionado para casarse con Andreina, no se lo perdona. Rosa delante de todos se hace pasar por loca. El comisario vuelve a la mansión de Anselmo con una orden para poder interrogar a Andreina y Anselmo.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Leonardo Alfonso enfrenta a su hermano Luis Enrique por la hija de Rosa, no le cuadran las fechas con el nacimiento de la bebe, no cree que sea su hija. Anselmo y Andreina se pelean por quien se va hacer cargo de la muerte de Sarmiento. Rosa le pide a Luis Enrique que se case con ella para que su hija reciba el 3% de las acciones del consorcio Macho Vergara y así poder cedérselas a Helena. De esa manera Helena tendría la mayoría de las acciones en las empresas de Anselmo y recuperaría todo lo que su marido le robo. Andreina le dice a Anselmo que va a matar a Rosa porque está a punto de sacarle a su marido. Rosa esta resentida con Leonardo Alfonso por haberse casado con Andreina y haberla traicionado.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: El comisario encuentra una pistola en la oficina de Anselmo, Rosa le dice a Leonardo Alfonso que va a demostrar que su padre es un delincuente. Andreina le dice a Anselmo que lo acaba de engañar, que el arma que le está dando es otra y que no es el arma con la que mato a Sarmiento. Rosa le trata de demostrar a Leonardo Alfonso que su padre fue quien se robó a Pedrito, pero él le dice que eso no es así que lo hizo Ada luz. Ella le dice que tiene razón pero cuando su padre se enteró no hizo lo correcto de entregárselo a ella. Luis Enrique le pide a Tomas que le cuente toda la verdad que sabe de su padre, que termine con las traiciones.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Rosa amenaza a Andreina con que va a envejecer tras las rejas. El comisario lleva a Anselmo a la jefatura y pide que lo metan en un calabozo. Rosa le dice a Helena que Leonardo Alfonso tiene a su padre en un pedestal y que cuando se entere de toda la verdad va a sufrir mucho. Ada Luz va a ver a Rosa para hablar de Pedrito, le dice que la va ayudar a recuperar a su hijo. Leonardo Alfonso va a ver a su padre a la cárcel y hablan de Pedrito, le cuenta que él no sabía que Pedrito no era su hijo y que era robado, le echa la culpa a Ada Luz. Leonardo Alfonso le dice que ahora que Rosa está viva puede reparar eso diciéndole a Pedrito toda la verdad.

programme.title: Episodio 113
programme.desc: Luis Enrique ve a Santa registrando las cosas de su padre y le dice que no va a permitir que se quede con las cosas que le pertenecen a su madre. Felisberto va a la jefatura para que dejen libre a su padre porque no tenían la orden de un juez para detenerlo. Andreina va a ver a Anselmo a la cárcel para burlarse de él, y se empiezan a acusar de todos los delitos que cometieron con tanta impunidad. Leonardo Alfonso le dice a Rosa que Anselmo quedo en libertad porque es inocente. Anselmo le agradece a Felisberto que lo haya sacado de la cárcel, festeja como loco que está libre. Anselmo cuando llega a la casa la ve a Santa con sus joyas y dinero pero ella para no ser descubierta le dice que agarro todo para que nadie se quede con sus cosas.

programme.title: Un Esposo para Estela
programme.desc: Estela Morales es una joven huérfana dueña de una hacienda en ruinas y llena de deudas llamada "El Vendaval". Al morir su madre, Estela descubre que necesita un esposo para poder cobrar la herencia.

programme.title: Un Esposo para Estela
programme.desc: Estela Morales es una joven huérfana dueña de una hacienda en ruinas y llena de deudas llamada "El Vendaval". Al morir su madre, Estela descubre que necesita un esposo para poder cobrar la herencia.

programme.title: Un Esposo para Estela
programme.desc: Estela Morales es una joven huérfana dueña de una hacienda en ruinas y llena de deudas llamada "El Vendaval". Al morir su madre, Estela descubre que necesita un esposo para poder cobrar la herencia.

programme.title: Un Esposo para Estela
programme.desc: Estela Morales es una joven huérfana dueña de una hacienda en ruinas y llena de deudas llamada "El Vendaval". Al morir su madre, Estela descubre que necesita un esposo para poder cobrar la herencia.

programme.title: A Daughter's Tale: Pankh
programme.desc: Vidya moves out of her house after she is asked by her in-laws to abort her second unborn girl child. Years later, one of her daughters who grows up to become an ace lawyer, decides to fight a case against her own father.

programme.title: Deewaar: Let's Bring Our Heroes Home
programme.desc: A group of Indian POW (Prisoners of War) from the 1971 Indo-Pak war rebels against the Pakistani army and tries to escape from their captivity. Helping the group in the mission is Gaurav, the son of a former Army Major also held captive by the enemy.

programme.title: The Legend of Bhagat Singh
programme.desc: During the British Raj, upon witnessing the atrocities of the British, Bhagat Singh grows up to be a fierce freedom fighter. His publicised ideas of revolution bring him to as much popularity as Mahatma Gandhi amongst Indians.

programme.title: Baatein Kahi Ankahi
programme.desc: Watch Baatein Kahi Ankahi with RJ Anmol In An Exclusive Interview With Bollywood Stars.

programme.title: Baatein Kahi Ankahi
programme.desc: Watch Baatein Kahi Ankahi with RJ Anmol In An Exclusive Interview With Bollywood Stars.

programme.title: Barah Aana
programme.desc: Barah Aana' is a story of three impoverished roommates and friends - a driver, a security guard and a waiter. The security guard finds a seemingly low-risk way of making easy money and tries to entice the others to join him in a series of offenses. Will the friends team up with him?

programme.title: This Is Not Financial Advice
programme.desc: Glauber Contessoto gambles his life savings on a joke cryptocurrency. Two months later, he becomes “The Dogecoin Millionaire” and an internet legend. While it might seem easy to get rich online, it’s even easier to lose it all. Directed by Chris Temple and Zach Ingrasci.

programme.title: Killed Walking Home
programme.desc: Every three days, a woman is killed in the UK. These women could be sisters, daughters, and friends. Although there is a lead that breaks open the case - what comes in light of the investigation is one that leaves an everlasting scar on the families.Directed by Afsheen Hussein, Jordan Hill, and Brian Aabech.

programme.title: Bruce Willis: All American Hero
programme.desc: Bruce Willis is one of the all-time greats. For the Hollywood action hero with an incredible body of workout was his portrayal of police officer John McClane in Die Hard that catapulted Bruce Willis to stardom. The action-packed flick hit movie screens across the country with a bang, later spawned four sequels, and established him as one of Hollywood's leading action hero. Bruce Willis has remained one of the most well-known actors of his generation. Known for his charm and humor, through career highs and lows Willis enjoyed much fame. With over a hundred films to his credit and many successful ones to boot, Bruce Willis is certainly an actor who has amassed a widespread fan following throughout his career. Willis showed no signs of slowing down, until a tragic announcement in 2022. Directed by Roxane Schlumberger.

programme.title: The Barbie Story
programme.desc: Barbie is way more than just a 12-inches long piece of plastic, she is way more than a toy. The legendary blond bombshell has grown into a phenomenon and a children's sensation. Wildly revolutionary, Barbie broke barriers, shattered glass ceilings, and has inspired countless dreams, wonder and imagination. The history of the doll is a testament to its enduring appeal and impact. Things have changed for her the same way things changed for women. Whatever we may think about Barbie - love or loathe her - it is impossible to ignore her worldwide impact. Let's step into the beautiful world of Barbie and take a look at her cultural revolution through the decades. Directed by Roxane Schlumberger.

programme.title: Barbie's Pink World
programme.desc: She is plastic, she is fantastic. She's Barbie of course. But she is way more than just plastic, she is way more than a toy. The pretty blond has become a worldwide sensation especially after the blockbuster movie starring Margot Robbie and directed by Greta Gerwig. Barbie's been around for so long, but hasn't aged a day. She's had more than 200 different jobs; she's been president, she's been to the moon, and she's done all the things that women want to do. She has a massive closet, and thousands of stylish outfits. Barbie has inspired dreams, wonder and imagination, and, can you guess her favourite color? Welcome to Barbie's Pink World. Directed by Roxane Schlumberger.

programme.title: Oppenheimer: The Real Story
programme.desc: In 1945, the world was ushered into the atomic age. With his role as the Father of the Bomb solidified, Oppenheimer became increasingly worried about the potential danger that scientific inventions could pose to humanity. Directed by Poorabi Gaekwad.

programme.title: Depp VS Heard: All On The Line
programme.desc: A trial that has divided fans and sent social and broadcast media into a frenzy. Two of the largest actors of modern-day (Johnny Depp and Amber Heard) go head to head in the court of law and public opinion. A gruelling 5 weeks. 50 million dollars on the line and a defamation case that will leave only one of them victorious. Everything is on the line in this battle of the century. This is… Depp vs Heard: All On The Line. Directed by Lucy Ciara McCutcheon.

programme.title: Depp VS Heard: The Verdict
programme.desc: April 2022. The world was watching the defamation trial of Johnny Depp vs Amber Heard, a murky, perplexing trial - at its centre one significant conflict. After deliberations the verdict was in... Directed by Lucy Ciara McCutcheon.

programme.title: Eat Flowers
programme.desc: Eat Flowers picks up in 2017 as photographer Cig Harvey’s best friend Mary is diagnosed with a rare form of leukemia. When forced to isolate during her treatment, she asks Cig to send her photographs. Everyday Cig sets out to bring color and life to Mary through her camera. Everyday Mary asks for more. ‘Eat Flowers’ brings us into the vibrant worlds that Cig creates for her. Directed by River Finlay

programme.title: Free to Care
programme.desc: A single mother with a passion for nursing, Lisa Creason wanted the freedom to pursue her dreams. When an unjust law prohibited her from doing so, she took the fight into her own hands and ended up opening doorways for thousands like her.

programme.title: Paperboy Love Prince Runs for Mayor
programme.desc: Rapper and street performer Paperboy Love Prince takes on the political elite in the race for NYC mayor. Directed by Owen Dubeck.

programme.title: Betty Feeds The Animals
programme.desc: Betty loves animals, she loves them so much that everyday she puts 30 bowls of food outside of her home to feed them. She feeds skunks, raccoons, cats, foxes and the occasional opossum. This is her story. Directed by James P. Gannon.

programme.title: Rosa: These Storms
programme.desc: Rosa, a young Mayan woman, sits alone. She stares into the camera and for the first time shares her story. Directed by Hannah Gregg and Sean Kusanagi.

programme.title: Deerwoods Deathtrap
programme.desc: 50 years ago, Jack and Betty were hit by a train and - survived. This is their story. Directed by James P. Gannon.

programme.title: Abundance
programme.desc: During the largest food crisis in a century, a group of college students catalyze a national movement to end food insecurity in the U.S. Directed by Owen Dubeck.

programme.title: Eat Flowers
programme.desc: Eat Flowers picks up in 2017 as photographer Cig Harvey’s best friend Mary is diagnosed with a rare form of leukemia. When forced to isolate during her treatment, she asks Cig to send her photographs. Everyday Cig sets out to bring color and life to Mary through her camera. Everyday Mary asks for more. ‘Eat Flowers’ brings us into the vibrant worlds that Cig creates for her. Directed by River Finlay

programme.title: Rosa: These Storms
programme.desc: Rosa, a young Mayan woman, sits alone. She stares into the camera and for the first time shares her story. Directed by Hannah Gregg and Sean Kusanagi.

programme.title: Deerwoods Deathtrap
programme.desc: 50 years ago, Jack and Betty were hit by a train and - survived. This is their story. Directed by James P. Gannon.

programme.title: Abundance
programme.desc: During the largest food crisis in a century, a group of college students catalyze a national movement to end food insecurity in the U.S. Directed by Owen Dubeck.

programme.title: The Undocumented Lawyer
programme.desc: Lizbeth Mateo is an attorney who swore to uphold the Constitution. She’s also undocumented. When a client takes sanctuary in a church, Lizbeth’s own experience guides their fight for justice. Directed by Chris Temple and Zach Ingrasci.

programme.title: BigNattyDaddy
programme.desc: Polarizing Instagram “celebrity” Tyler Jackson—better known by his moniker, BigNattyDaddy—is the internet equivalent of this classic trope: an outspoken, steroid-using 15-year-old bodybuilder. Directed by John Merizalde.

programme.title: Ode To Desolation
programme.desc: There used to be thousands of fire lookout posts across the US, but now, because of the advancement of satellite technology, there are about 60 left. Jim Henterly holds his post as the eyes and ears of the historic Desolation Peak Fire Lookout - in an effort to preserve the human narrative. Directed by Lindsey Hagen.

programme.title: Entrapped
programme.desc: The FBI claimed it exposed a dangerous group of men in a massive entrapment operation over an alleged plot to attack a U.S. Army base in New Jersey. But were they really terrorists? Directed by Razan Ghalayini.

programme.title: Balloonfest
programme.desc: The city of Cleveland was abuzz on September 27, 1986. Over 1.5 million balloons were about to be released at once, breaking the world record. What could go wrong? Directed by Nathan Truesdell.

programme.title: Girls Section
programme.desc: In remote North Pakistan, a quiet revolution is growing. For the first time, girls in the region are challenging tradition for their right to go to school. Directed by Kathryn Everett.

programme.title: Tracing Light
programme.desc: A dive into the subconscious minds of Brooklyn based installation art duo, Hovver. Katherine Brice and Chris Lunney take natural light formations and isolate them in their art - this is their process. Directed by Alex Ramsey.

programme.title: Eleanor Ambos Interiors
programme.desc: As a celebrated interior designer loses her eyesight to macular degeneration, she begins to see her life's work in a new light. This eccentric renegade topples ageist stereotypes as she grapples with the limitations of her aging body. Directed by Katrina Sorrentino and Andrew Ellis.

programme.title: Bodega De Edgar
programme.desc: The courageous story of Edgar Torres immigrating to the US illegally with his father in the 80’s, becoming a wine expert and starting a winery in Paso Robles, CA to give his children a better future. Directed by Nick Cavalier.

programme.title: Osama & Ayman
programme.desc: Osama and Ayman Abdeldayem skate through the streets of our nation's capital, while navigating growing Islamophobia with style and humor. Directed by Ben Mullinkosson, Sam Price-Waldman, and Chris Cresci.

programme.title: Elder
programme.desc: A Mormon missionary finds his world turned upside down when he falls in love with a handsome, Italian Communist. With original 8mm film Tom Clark recounts a love story on the coast of Italy. Directed by Genéa Gaudet.

programme.title: Wonder Mark
programme.desc: Los Angeles icon Mark Mahoney is the tattoo artist for Tupac, David Beckham, Lana Del Rey and Johnny Depp. In a surreal man-versus-myth-style documentary, Mahoney inks French troubadour Johnny Hallyday while he talks about his personal hopes and fears. Directed by Ivan Olita.

programme.title: Cherry Pop: The Story Of The World's Fanciest Cat
programme.desc: Cherry Pop was no ordinary cat. Beloved by her wealthy socialite owners, she lived life in the lap of luxury. This delightful story will tickle your funny bone and touch your heart. Directed by Kareem Tabsch.

programme.title: Strike
programme.desc: Bill Fong is passionate about bowling. One seeming ordinary night all may change for this underdog as Fong begins to get strike after strike, nearing the ever elusive 'perfect series.' Directed by Joey Daoud.

programme.title: The Fate Of The Wild
programme.desc: On the vast, desolate rangeland of Nevada, herds of wild horses still run free. When the Bureau of Land Management determines the herds have grown too large, it sends a helicopter to buzz overhead and corral the animals into pens to be either sold or slaughtered. For years, activist and artist Laura Leigh has been photographing and documenting the abuses these wild horses have suffered. The Fate of the Wild shows that the fate of these majestic, untamed symbols of the American West is intertwined with our own. Directed by Andrew Michael Ellis.

programme.title: The Rocket On The Roof
programme.desc: Curiosity gets the best of a man trying to solve the mystery of a rocket curiously perched on a nearby roof. Directed by Ryan Maxey and Josh Polon.

programme.title: Muxes
programme.desc: In the southern state of Oaxaca where, in the indigenous communities around the town of Juchitán, the world is not divided simply into males and females. The local Zapotec people have made room for a third category, which they call “muxes” - men who consider themselves women and live in a socially sanctioned limbo between the two genders. Directed by Ivan Olita.

programme.title: We Are Oscar Mike
programme.desc: Through his non-profit foundation, Oscar Mike, Noah helps rehabilitate other veterans through the adaptive sports that saved his own life. Directed by Nick Cavalier.

programme.title: Kid Yamaka
programme.desc: This deeply human story explores boxer Zachary "Kid Yamaka” Wohlman’s difficult past, his training under world-class coach Freddie Roach, and his path to personal redemption through boxing, Judaism, and sobriety. With Zachary’s 2021 passing, this film serves as a moving tribute to his hustle, heart and soul and to all those who struggle with addiction. Directed by Matt Ogens.

programme.title: Slomo
programme.desc: Depressed and frustrated with his life, Dr. John Kitchin abandons his career as a neurologist and moves to Pacific Beach. There, he undergoes a radical transformation into SLOMO, trading his lab coat for a pair of rollerblades and his IRA for a taste of divinity. Directed by Joshua Izenberg.

programme.title: Mister Sunshine
programme.desc: Meet the millionaire who became a shoeshine man peddling goodwill and cheer throughout Auckland. Larry Woods provides brilliant thoughts on how to live a happy life. Directed by Eldon Booth.

programme.title: Five Stone Of Lead
programme.desc: On the west coast of Ireland kids don’t dream about winning the world cup, they dream about being championship jockeys. This is the story of a 12 year old jockey, Dylan, who is tiny even for a jockey. Directed by Jonny Madderson and Jono Stevens.

programme.title: The Blessings Of Aging
programme.desc: The sweet and sassy residents of a retirement community explain the many upsides of getting older. Directed by Jenny Schweitzer Bell.

programme.title: Dolphin Lover
programme.desc: Dolphin Lover is a critically acclaimed, award winning short documentary on the incredible true story of Malcolm Brenner and his summer long love affair with Dolly the dolphin. Directed by Joey Daoud and Kareem Tabsch.

programme.title: Pickle Man
programme.desc: Facing certain death by ALS, Arthur Cohen decides to leave a legacy of pickles. PickALS, that is. Arthur is brilliant, hilarious and courageous in this intimate portrait of a man facing a brutal disease. Directed by Nastasya Popov.

programme.title: Hotel 22
programme.desc: Each night in Silicon Valley, a public bus transforms into an unofficial shelter for the homeless. Hotel 22 captures a single, dramatic night on the Line 22 route. Directed by Elizabeth Lo.

programme.title: A View From The Window
programme.desc: An immersive glimpse of a school day through the eyes of deaf children. Follow a third grade class at the California School for the Deaf in Fremont as they learn about everything from marine life to police harassment. Directed by Christian Filippone and Azar Kafaei.

programme.title: Gotta Groove Records
programme.desc: A short film on the history and resurgence of vinyl records from the perspective of an artist focused pressing plant in Cleveland, Ohio. A hero story about grit, manufacturing and warm tones. Directed by Nick Cavalier.

programme.title: How To Make A Rainbow
programme.desc: The story of a young girl and her mother, observed over the course of two years, as they move together through transitions of home, identity and name. Directed by Ryan Maxey.

programme.title: Fight Or Flight
programme.desc: Fight or Flight chronicles the journey of the first female pilot employed by Colorado Parks and Wildlife. Drawn to flying as a means to flee her early trauma, she pursues a career in professional aviation and discovers she must first assemble the tools required to face her past and heal. Directed by Lindsey Hagen.

programme.title: After Skid Row
programme.desc: After Skid Row documents the journey of Barbie Carter as she navigates the transition to housed life following the brutal reality of a decade on the streets. Her unique story and compelling character help to both demystify and deeply personalize a homelessness epidemic that continues to swell across Los Angeles. Directed by Lindsey Hagen.

programme.title: Quiet Minds Silent Streets
programme.desc: Quiet Minds Silent Streets introduces viewers to a community that has been chronically affected by gun violence. This thoughtful, eye-opening documentary asks whether they can find a new way forward with a relatively simple technique: mindfulness and meditation. Executive produced by Director X and directed by Karen Chapman.

programme.title: The Thousand Year Journey
programme.desc: "Routine is the enemy of time." Jedidiah Jenkins rides his bicycle from Oregon to Patagonia, the southern tip of South America, while expounding upon ideas that made him leave a job he loved for the open road. Directed by Kenny Laubbacher.

programme.title: The Magic Of Chess
programme.desc: Filmed at the 2019 Elementary Chess Championships at the Nashville Opryland resort, a group of children share their insights about the benefits of chess. Directed by Jenny Schweitzer Bell.

programme.title: Still/Life
programme.desc: A cultural renaissance in the historic city of Yangon, and a rare glimpse into a country in extreme transition. Directed by Josh Hayward.

programme.title: After Skid Row
programme.desc: After Skid Row documents the journey of Barbie Carter as she navigates the transition to housed life following the brutal reality of a decade on the streets. Her unique story and compelling character help to both demystify and deeply personalize a homelessness epidemic that continues to swell across Los Angeles. Directed by Lindsey Hagen.

programme.title: Quiet Minds Silent Streets

This thoughtful, eye-opening documentary asks whether they can find a new way forward with a relatively simple technique: mindfulness and meditation. Executive produced by Director X and directed by Karen Chapman.

programme.title: Deprogrammed
programme.desc: DEPROGRAMMED chronicles Ted 'Black Lightning' Patrick's anti-cult crusade. His practice of deprogramming, also known as “reverse brainwashing,” quickly snowballed into a vast underground movement composed of concerned parents, ex-cultists, and sympathetic law-enforcers whose mission was to physically and mentally remove individuals from cults. Some of the people he's saved, however, wonder if his services cause more harm than good. Directed by Mia Donovan.

programme.title: Killed Walking Home
programme.desc: Every three days, a woman is killed in the UK. These women could be sisters, daughters, and friends. Although there is a lead that breaks open the case - what comes in light of the investigation is one that leaves an everlasting scar on the families.Directed by Afsheen Hussein, Jordan Hill, and Brian Aabech.

Bruce Willis has remained one of the most well-known actors of his generation. Known for his charm and humor, through career highs and lows Willis enjoyed much fame. Barbie has inspired dreams, wonder and imagination, and, can you guess her favourite color? Welcome to Barbie's Pink World. Directed by Roxane Schlumberger.

programme.title: Christmas Crush
programme.desc: When a woman learns of her high school reunion a week before Christmas, she's ecstatic to finally have her chance to win the one "that got away" back.

programme.title: London Mitchell's Christmas
programme.desc: London becomes faced with a diagnosis of prostate cancer which forces him to rethink his total outlook on life during the Christmas holiday.

programme.title: Santa Girl
programme.desc: Santa Claus� only daughter wants to experience the �real world� before she must marry the son of Jack Frost and take over the family business. Cassie Claus sets off to college while trying to keep her famous father a secret.

programme.title: Already Tomorrow in Hong Kong
programme.desc: Ruby (Jamie Chung) and Josh (Bryan Greenberg) spent an unforgettable night together in Hong Kong a year ago, and now their brief encounter is about to get a second chance.

programme.title: The Longest Week
programme.desc: When Conrad is kicked out and cut off at the age of forty, he crashes with his only friend and falls in love with his friend�s girlfriend

programme.title: I'll Be Homeless For Christmas
programme.desc: When a petty thief learns that his latest mark is a struggling single mother who works at a homeless shelter, he decides to use his savvy street smarts to make this Christmas one to remember for her and her young son.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: A 16-year-old tries to play matchmaker for her widowed father during Christmastime.

programme.title: Mercy Christmas
programme.desc: When Michael Briskett meets the perfect woman, his ideal Christmas dream comes true when she invites him to her family's holiday celebration. Dreams shattered, Michael struggles to survive once he realizes HE will be Christmas dinner.

programme.title: Christmas Break-In
programme.desc: Christmas Break-In is the story of Izzy, a spunky nine year-old who gets left at school on the last day before Christmas break.

programme.title: 12 Days of Christmas
programme.desc: During their first winter break from college, two childhood friends navigate turbulent reunions, unspoken romances, and even an unplanned pregnancy.

programme.title: Dear Santa

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Sunny was enraged when she learned her mom, Carolyn, was adopting Sunny’s 36-year-old ex-boyfriend, Chris, and begged her to not go through with the process. Now that the adoption is final, she says Carolyn puts more time and energy into her relationship with Chris than into their mother-daughter bond. Carolyn says she always wanted a son and was over-the-moon when she finally adopted Chris. She says no parent has to ask their child for permission to have more children, so why should she need Sunny’s approval to adopt Chris? Carolyn and Sunny see each other for the first time in more than six months on Dr. Phil’s stage. Can Sunny move past her feelings of betrayal, and can Dr. Phil help them mend their broken bond? Then, why did Chris, a married father of three, want to be adopted?

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: On the Outs With the In-Laws
programme.desc: Manipulative, violent, controlling, downright diabolical. These are some of the words Anna-Laura uses to describe her mother-in-law, Janice. Anna-Laura says her mother-in-law has threatened to take her children away, calls 12-15 times per day, peeks in their windows, goes through their trash, drives to Anna-Laura’s house and points her finger – from her car- as if she is pulling the trigger of a gun. Morgan says his mother also opens the front door and walks into their home unannounced. Anna-Laura says she got a restraining order against her mother-in-law after Janice hit her, which Janice denies. She says Janice is forcing her husband, Morgan, to choose between his mother and his wife. What can this family do to get along with one another?

programme.desc: A woman posts Tik Tok videos of her struggle with Tourette syndrome.

programme.desc: Do you have a relative scheming to get money from a rich aunt, uncle or even parents when they pass away?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: You hear about scams all the time - e-mails and voicemails claiming you have won valuable prizes. Dr. Phil is outraged by what some scammers are doing to him, his family and his viewers. One website offers a Dr. Phil quiz to win $5,000 every hour, another says it has the official Dr. Phil personality test, but even more shocking are 800 numbers that take callers' money for the promise of over the phone therapy with Dr. Phil and Robin. But these 800 numbers connect innocent victims with con artists posing as Dr. Phil staff members. The fake staffers ask anywhere from $375 to $1,000 for consultation time that obviously never takes place.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Is it asking too much for your 20-something child to make his or her own money and live independently? Barbara says her daughter, Chelsea, needs to grow up! She says she’s given her daughter nothing but the best, and all she has to show for it is a lying child who won’t speak to her. Chelsea says she can’t live up to her mom’s “rich bitch” expectations and just wants to be left alone. Mother and daughter see each other on the Dr. Phil stage for the first time in seven months, and sparks fly! Is Barbara surprised to learn the secret Chelsea reveals? Then, Chelsea’s grandmother isn’t immune to her granddaughter’s conniving ways. Learn why she feels used. And, Barbara says Chelsea has spent thousands of dollars of her family’s money, and anytime she earns her own, she spends it and doesn’t pay her family back. Dr. Phil conducts an experiment to see what the young woman will do with $500. You may be surprised by the results!
