programme.desc: Dynamic Media Partners - Shriners - PP SHFFT8CGTH

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Super Special Sonic Search and Smash Squad
programme.desc: When Sonic and Tails are captured by Grounder and Scratch, Sonic tricks them into letting them escape by reminiscing about how they all met. Several badniks seen early on in this episode later resurfaced in Dr. Robotnik's Mean Bean Machine.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on pursuit with Scratch and Grounder, Sonic and Tails hide in an underground mine which a miser mole think that they are trespassers.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic saves a female hedgehog from Scratch and Grounder which Sonic falls in love with, while Dr. Robotnik plans to flood a village by stealing the water from the Mobius reservoir.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic saves a female hedgehog from Scratch and Grounder which Sonic falls in love with, while Dr. Robotnik plans to flood a village by stealing the water from the Mobius reservoir.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic must save a family of sloths from Dr. Robotnik's slow-motion ray, but when he himself is slowed down by Scratch and Grounder, Tails and the sloth family must take action.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Desperate to get workers to build a Robotnik statue, Dr. Robotnik opens Casino Night Zone with his pal Smiley but when Sonic stops Scratch and Grounder, Robotnik traps Tails so Sonic has to make a choice to save his pal.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik imprisons a satirical cartoonist named Sketch Lampoon for making fun of him in his comic book, much to the anger of Sonic, his biggest fan. Sonic purposely allows his own capture as well, but does not expect to be placed in a maximum-security jail cell. With Robotnik angrily sends Sonic in the cell for interfering with his plans once again.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Scratch, Grounder and Coconuts set up a chili-dog trap which then resulted with Tails been captured by a mysterious person so Sonic has to find Tails and for Robotnik and co to capture Sonic.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Close Encounters of the Sonic Kind
programme.desc: While Scratch and Grounder try to catch Sonic using a Suction plate, two aliens, one being a prince, crash lands on Mobius. Sonic meets the prince when he finds out that the prince's baby brother would blow up Mobius which Sonic must save.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik's momma escapes from the home for mothers of villains and demands her birthday present! When she endangers Sonic and Tails, and they manage to have her taken back to the home, even Robotnik is glad to see her go.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Coconuts is exiled by Robotnik to a remote jungle, where he uses a giant baby ape to destroy villages. But Sonic exposes Coconuts as a robot, and the baby ape's real Dad takes Coconuts and the baby ape away for a spanking.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: A country and western singer released a song about Sonic which is making Dr. Robotnik mad and builds a music destroyer robot.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: An energetic salesman named Wes Weasley sells Robotnik numerous gadgets to help Scratch and Grounder capture Sonic. However, Robotnik later comes to regret it when Weaseley's gadgets keep backfiring.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails rescue Lucas, Robotnik's first prisoner, and attempt to reunite him with his girlfriend, Lucinda. However, Robotnik is also in love with Lucinda, and pursues Lucas.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: En route to stop a train of explosives from arriving at Robotnik's munition factory, Sonic and Tails must deal with a duo of bears named Big Griz and Big Mike after Scratch and Grounder tell them that Sonic and Tails are the enemies.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik takes Professor Von Schlemmer hostage and uses his growth machine to try and enlarge himself. However, the machine backfires, and enlarges Tails instead in nearby Wienerville. Sonic must keep the famished Tails from getting into more danger as Robotnik tricks the citizens into thinking that Sonic is the villain, while Robotnik is the hero planning to save the city.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic decides to find Tails a suitable foster home to ensure his safety, Robotnik finds out and creates a robot fox family, who pose as Tails' long-lost parents.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When overweight, elderly superhero Captain Rescue bungles in his attempts to help Sonic, he grows tired of his incompetence. Robotnik then uses Captain Rescue to successfully imprison Sonic in an impenetrable force field, and Tails and Captain Rescue must save him.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Scratch suffers a blow to the head and believes that he is his favorite television character, Edgar Eagle. Sonic uses this to his advantage in preventing another of Robotnik's schemes.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: There is a Sonic Appreciation Day happening where Sonic is the guest in a hotel. However, someone steals his power sneakers and now Sonic and Tails have to find the culprit.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him and they soon find themselves spinning through interdimensional limbo.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik opens up a resort to make the resident Mobians his slaves, Sonic enlists the help of some robots from an area of Mobius called Scrap Valley.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik creates a robot Sonic suit with the intent of ruining the hedgehog's reputation. He forces a lab rat named Laurence to pilot by threatening his parents.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Dr. Robotnik creates a genius chip so he would have enough brains to rule Mobius, however a computer hacker got hold of it which then the chip landed inside Grounder causing him to be smart.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic leaves Tails in charge of protecting a squirrel village food supply, when he zips off to stop a dam from breaking. Robotnik sends Scratch and Grounder after Tails, who defends himself the best he can with Home Alone booby traps for Scratch and Grounder. When Tails is finally caught, Sonic speeds back to save him.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik introduces the Ultra Freeze-O-Matic, announcing his plan to freeze every citizen on Mobius so that he can install Servitude Chips into the frozen citizens and make them unquestionably obedient. Sonic and Tails must foil the scheme.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik invades Labyrinth, an underwater city, and kidnaps Princess Bubbles, a seahorse-dude named Surff seeks Sonic's help. It seems Surff and the Princess are in love, but the royal family deems Surff unworthy. Sonic, Tails and Surff must avoid the undersea traps and Mobius sea monsters while Sonic rescues the Princess and reunites her with Surff -- making it look like Surff did the whole thing.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik reprograms a machine created by Von Schlemmer capable of turning dreams into reality, unleashing a Nightmare Monster upon Mobius.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outer space to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars. Sonic builds a rocket out of S and G's spare parts, and all return to Mobius.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik's attempt to turn Sonic into an old man with his newest device backfires, turning him and Tails, and later himself, into babies. Now stuck in a day-care, the infantile Sonic and Tails must try to keep Robotnik under control, while Scratch and Grounder attempt to get him back.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik plans to block out the sun and extinguish all life and nature on the planet Mobius. Then he creates a robot son and tries to train him in the ways of wickedness. But when Robotnik Jr. meets Sonic, he becomes a naturalist and teams up with Sonic to thwart Robotnik's evil scheme.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik invents an electron altering generator which makes Scratch and Grounder twice as fast as Sonic. When they lose it and Tails picks it up, Tails speeds through the Mobius countryside leaving disasters and accidents in his wake. Seeing this, Robotnik convinces the villagers that the little fox belongs in jail, and Tails is forced to flee. With Tails all alone, Scratch and Grounder attack, and Sonic makes a last minute rescue.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver). But Mac escapes before Robotnik installs the final Get Sonic program, and teams up with Sonic and Tails to BLAST Robotnik.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic joins up with a group of Dr. Robotnik's rejects who have been banished to the dump and helps them understand that their shortcomings were really their strengths.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outer space to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars. Sonic builds a rocket out of S and G's spare parts, and all return to Mobius.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When a Rebel Base is threatened by Robotnik, Sonic and Tails team up with Big Mike and Da Bears to run a booby-trapped gauntlet in their gigantic Road Warrior-like truck, breaking through every obstacle S and G put in their way until they save the rebels.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik and a rival named Quark Rex try to cooperate in capturing Sonic. However, Sonic tricks them into becoming enemies, and they try to outdo each other.

programme.title: The Abominable Snowbeast
programme.desc: Brainy and his friends organize a journey to Ice Mountain to pick the rare snow flower for Papa Smurf. They meet a terrifying snow beast that befriends them, due to Smurfette's kindness, and helps them find the tiny flower.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Smurfette has found a new friend, Laura, a six-year-old child whose parents live near the forest. Together, the two girls wander in the forest. But an old witch who lives in the forest catches them.

programme.title: Gormandizing Greedy
programme.desc: Greedy overdoes it. He's getting heavier and heavier until his weight puts him in jeopardy. The evil Gargamel is going to catch him... Can Greedy be saved by Papa Smurf?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: An evil imp gives Smurfette dancing shoes and then tricks her into promising to marry him. All her little friends rush to her rescue and Papa Smurf magically puts the dancing shoes on the imp. He is forced to dance off into the night.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Sir Hefty discovers a wayward knight to help him defeat a dragon whose fire is threatening to destroy the forest. Alas, the knight proves to be a coward, leaving Hefty to prove just how brave he is when he sends the dragon away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Clumsy and Smurfette are captured by the wicked Bombast, who plans to exhibit them in his sideshow. Papa Smurf hurries to their rescue and using the bungling Gargamel for interference is able to rescue his Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Because they feel unappreciated, Poet and Painter leave Smurf Village and head for Storm Island, totally unaware that Gargamel is planning to trap them. Papa Smurf and his faithful volunteers rescue their friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: The Good, The Bad And The Smurfy
programme.desc: King Argon is a burly, boorish brute, but his wizard Mordain is worse still. He plans to use several Smurfs he has captured to steal all of the King's gold...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: The Smurf Who Couldn't Say No
programme.desc: Being asked to go to the Marsh to bring back the rare Foxfire is a great honor for a Smurf. But Scaredy Smurf is reluctant to confront the Marsh Monster so he sends the Smurf who cannot say no.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Determined to fly over Smurf village to catch a Smurf to take to the Wizard's Convention, Gargamel invokes his Book of Spells to help him. A series of funny flying machine mishaps occur and Gargamel is once more the laughing stock of the Wizard's Convention.

programme.title: The First Telesmurf
programme.desc: Papa Smurf pours a magic potion over the new Smurf-melon patch, which instantly grows and grows all over the village and forest. The Smurfs use the blossoms as a telephone, but before Gargamel can trace their voices, the flowers turn into melons and telesmurf is no more.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In his search for something new, Vanity dons a Gargamel-made magic hat that transforms his face into a mess. Through trickery, Papa Smurf gets the antidote from the wicked wizard and once more, Vanity is beautiful.

programme.title: No Time For Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy, Brainy, Clumsy, and Smurfette discover the hourglass of time in a cave and due to their bungling, time spins erratically out of control for all of the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Due to a wild experiment Clumsy is able to store endless knowledge into his memory. Gargamel captures him, trying to unlock Papa Smurf's invisibility formula, but at the last minute, Clumsy tricks him with the wrong ingredients.

programme.title: Good Neighbour Smurf
programme.desc: When Brainy's house burns down, he moves in with his fellow Smurfs; and one by one they kick him out because of his meddling.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf gives Weakling a special cream to wear that will restore his strength. Shortly after, he is awarded for his daring deeds of strength and his confidence really soars when he realizes the cream is smurfberry jam.

programme.title: Harmony Steals The Show
programme.desc: Harmony unwittingly signs a contract with Ghost Writer for a symphony that imprisons him in a ghostly nightclub for life! Papa Smurf demands a jury trial with ghostly jurors and a judge that finds Harmony innocent and Ghost Writer guilty of plagiarism.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hogatha the witch promises Gargamel a magical whistle if he will introduce her to the warlock of her dreams. But they are both deceived by each other's trickery: Gargamel dresses up as the warlock, and Hogatha's magical whistle is only a birdcall.

programme.title: A Bell For Azrael
programme.desc: Gargamel puts a spell on a bell attached to Azrael's tail that will lead the cat to the Smurfs. Papa Smurf outwits him with a counter-spell that leads the wizard to Big Mouth instead of the tasty Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hefty dresses like Smurfette to lure an enamored gnome, Piltkin, away from the Smurf Village. They burrow underground and meet a female gnome who falls in love with Piltkin who then casts Smurfette aside for his new heartthrob.

programme.title: The Magic Earrings
programme.desc: Hogatha manages to obtain the magic golden earrings of Sonoria that will enable her to hear Smurfy voices from afar. Following Lazy's snores, she almost reaches the Smurf Village until Harmony's horn-blasts blow in her earrings and she flies home in a rage.

programme.title: Gargamel's Last Will
programme.desc: Scruple, apprentice to the evil wizard Gargamel, is not above playing a trick or two on his master. When he learns that Puppy, the dog that belongs to the Smurfs, bit Gargamel, Scruple tells the wizard that by midnight, he'll have changed into a dog....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When his bear runs away from his fairground show, the gruff, uncouth Malakoff thinks he's out of business. But he's able to catch a much better show: the Smurflings. Can Brainy and Wild Smurf find a way to bring back the runaway bear?

programme.title: Smurfing The Unicorns
programme.desc: When Puppy, the Smurfs' well-loved dog, drinks tainted water and becomes very sick, Papa Smurf says there is only one chance to save him – but what is needed is the touch of a unicorn's horn. Can the Smurfs find it?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Nobody Smurf is the Smurf that everybody always forgets. He'd like to develop a personality, get some sort of recognition from his peers, but he fails miserably. Must he remain forever the one that is overlooked? Or will he find his true personality?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In another Smurf theatrical super-production based – very loosely – on Alexandre Dumas' characters, a masterpiece of the stage is created, with a few lines from Romeo and Juliet thrown in.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs come to the rescue of two children and their grandfather when a mysterious stranger appears and causes their sleigh to crash. Knocking on Gargamel's door for help puts them and the Smurfs in danger…

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy has built a very complex Smurf machine that does everything. It proves dangerous when it nearly destroys the village, but comes in useful when, with the help of the other Smurfs, it saves the young prince Gerard's kingdom from the queen aunt Imperia's dastardly intentions.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs discover a fountain of youth that is guarded by a wicked troll, who steals Papa Smurf's magic book. They convince Gargamel to help them and the greedy villain runs to get the water, but manages to fall in with the troll. As the two chase each other all over the countryside, the Smurfs are able to retrieve Papa Smurf's book.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Simon is lost in the forest and in search of his parents. Simon is the son of a couple of giants. The Smurfs try to bring him home, but then Gargamel interrupts the party.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Once in a blue moon, as the legend goes, a baby Smurf is delivered to the Smurfs and everyone in the village becomes attached to the new arrival. But a mistake has been made and the stork returns to take the baby back. Grouchy and Smurfette have become so attached to the baby that the baby is returned.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Bigmouth steals the Smurfs' winter food supply and Brainy concocts one of Papa Smurf's magic strength potions so he can fight the greedy giant. The super formula wears off, but Papa Smurf works a fast switch, replacing the food with rocks and Bigmouth is none the wiser.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hogatha turns herself into a Smurf, plotting revenge on the little people for destroying her magic locket. Papa Smurf outwits her and banishes her from the forest once more.

programme.title: The Baby Smurf
programme.desc: Gargamel turns himself into a Baby Smurf, to be adopted by the Smurfette. He causes complete chaos in the Smurf Village when he tries to blow it up with a time bomb! Papa Smurf discovers his evil plot and uses the explosive to send the wizard back to his dismal castle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs' winter food supply is destroyed and they journey to a distant castle in search of shelter. Initially, they think the castle is haunted, but after they solve the mystery of a greedy pack of rats, the grateful owner presents them with an abundance of food for their long winter.

programme.title: The Purple Smurfs
programme.desc: The purple fly bites Lazy and an epidemic starts that turns the little villagers into angry, purple Smurfs. Papa Smurf discovers that the pollen from a tuberose flower is an antidote and soon things are smurfy again.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Brainy makes an enlarging potion that turns Hefty into human size. The big-little strong man captures Gargamel and brings him back to the Smurf Village where Papa Smurf magically causes Azrael to chase his master back to his dreary castle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: Now You Smurf 'Em, Now You Don't
programme.desc: The underground trolls who want them to be their slaves capture the Smurfs. Papa Smurf ingeniously frees them and then destroys the trolls' magic crystal ball that gives them power over the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In an effort to find out where the Smurfs' secret diamond stash is hidden, Gargamel pretends to be their friend. When he shows his true, wicked self, Papa Smurf works a magic spell to save his little Smurfs from the vicious clutches of the evil wizard.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Lazy dreams he is on Paradise Island and free from all the work Papa Smurf inflicts on him. His fantasy turns into a nightmare that sends him eagerly back to work once more.

programme.title: The Abominable Snowbeast
programme.desc: Brainy and his friends organize a journey to Ice Mountain to pick the rare snow flower for Papa Smurf. They meet a terrifying snow beast that befriends them, due to Smurfette's kindness, and helps them find the tiny flower.

programme.desc: The Smurfs come to the rescue of two children and their grandfather when a mysterious stranger appears and causes their sleigh to crash. Knocking on Gargamel's door for help puts them and the Smurfs in danger…

programme.desc: Handy has built a very complex Smurf machine that does everything. It proves dangerous when it nearly destroys the village, but comes in useful when, with the help of the other Smurfs, it saves the young prince Gerard's kingdom from the queen aunt Imperia's dastardly intentions.

programme.desc: The Smurfs discover a fountain of youth that is guarded by a wicked troll, who steals Papa Smurf's magic book. They convince Gargamel to help them and the greedy villain runs to get the water, but manages to fall in with the troll. As the two chase each other all over the countryside, the Smurfs are able to retrieve Papa Smurf's book.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Simon is lost in the forest and in search of his parents. Simon is the son of a couple of giants. The Smurfs try to bring him home, but then Gargamel interrupts the party.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Once in a blue moon, as the legend goes, a baby Smurf is delivered to the Smurfs and everyone in the village becomes attached to the new arrival. But a mistake has been made and the stork returns to take the baby back. Grouchy and Smurfette have become so attached to the baby that the baby is returned.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Growing, harvesting and preparing food takes up much of the Smurfs' time. Handy invents a machine that farms and processes food. But this wonderful invention has its drawbacks...

programme.title: S-Shivering S-Smurfs
programme.desc: Winter has come all of a sudden. The Smurfs are almost all victims of smurfmonia. Can Tracker Smurf find the healing smurfroot without falling into the evil Gargamel's traps?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: This is the dramatic, moving story of the friendship between Smurfette and her pet mouse. A sad event reduces Smurfette to tears... Can the Smurfs comfort the despairing Smurfette?

programme.title: It Came From Outer Smurf
programme.desc: Dreamy wants to encounter beings from outer space so much that no one believes him when he talks of having met one. Yet the arrival of this extraterrestrial is going to wreak havoc in the Smurf Village...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy Smurf has saved Clumsy from a horrible fate. Clumsy swears eternal devotion to his savior and does his best to repay his debt… With awkward results. A clever scheme is needed to stop Clumsy's well-meant catastrophes...

programme.title: Revenge Of The Smurfs
programme.desc: A war is raging in the Middle Ages. Knights in armor in hot pursuit inadvertently destroy the Smurfs Village so a small band of Smurfs decide to avenge this wrongdoing. Won't Papa Smurf think this is too human-like a reaction?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel has found a new diabolical scheme to get rid of the Smurfs: a glittering powder that is going to reduce them to helpless laughter...

programme.title: The A-Maze-Ing Smurfs
programme.desc: Jokey Smurf is dying to meet Melchior the Magnificent, creator of the famous Vanishing Box trick. Can Gargamel catch the Smurfs in Melchior's Amazing Maze?

programme.title: Smurf Van Winkle
programme.desc: Lazy Smurf is getting too lazy. The other Smurfs decide to play a trick on him: when he wakes up, he is surrounded by wrinkled, elderly Smurfs who tell him he has been sleeping for several centuries...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Scaredy Smurf runs into the Village screaming about the sky being about to smurf down. And just at the same moment, Papa Smurf is beset by uncontrollable fits of sneezing...

programme.title: El Regreso De Don Pitufo
programme.desc: Cuando una gota de la nueva poción de Papá Pitufo cae en el libro de aventuras de los Pitufitos, el héroe de ficción cobra vida. El intrépido Don Pitufo, que desea deshacer a los Pitufos del malvado Gargamel, lo captura con valentía…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Indeciso, tal como su nombre indica, no consigue decidirse sobre nada. Los otros Pitufos le llevan al bosque para hacer una prueba de supervivencia en la que únicamente pueda encontrar el camino de vuelta a casa tomando decisiones. Sin embargo, acaba en el castillo de Baltasar.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Gruñón aprende que las emociones pueden ser fantásticas, sobre todo después de que la malvada Clorhidris cree un corazón de hielo para despojar a todos de la bondad y el amor.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El Pitufo Carpintero se encuentra con una anciana trol en el bosque, que le suplica que le ayude a librarse de un grano rojo que tiene en la nariz… ¡dándole un buen puntapié! Pitufo Carpintero la ayuda sin mucho convencimiento. Y el resultado resulta sorprendente para él.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: No todos los días se encuentra uno con una flor parlante. Y, en especial, con un personaje como Petaluma, una planta bulbosa algo arrogante con la que Pitufina se encuentra en el bosque. Por supuesto, Pitufina se muestra encantada y lleva a Petaluma con ella a la Aldea Pitufa… desencadenando un proceso que pondrá en peligro a todos los Pitufos. Parece que las flores están hechas para contemplarlas y no para escucharlas.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: ¡Pitufo Torpe ha desenterrado una extraña piedra! En ella, puede ver los eventos que van a suceder… ¡No obstante, conocer parte del futuro a veces trae mala suerte!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: A veces ocurren accidentes. ¡En esta ocasión, un error de Pitufo Bromista hace que su sombra cobre vida! Y a la sombra le encanta hacer bromas a todos los habitantes de la Aldea Pitufa…

programme.title: Ya No Tengo Miedo
programme.desc: Una vez más, el infalible plan de Gargamel para atrapar a los Pitufos ha fracasado. Los Pitufos aprovechan para gastarle una broma: disfrazados de pequeños ángeles azules, le enseñarán a enmendar su conducta…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Nadie le cree al Abuelo Pitufo cuando habla de junglas y sabanas lejanas, repletas de gatos salvajes gigantes, caballos a rayas, comedores de hojas de cuello largo y extrañas tribus… Tan solo algunos Pitufitos dan cierto crédito a sus historias. Pero, cuando Abuelo Pitufo escucha en el bosque el sonido del tambor real mágico, un instrumento capaz de domar bestias salvajes, se lanza a la aventura para demostrar que no es un contador de historias al que el cerebro le juega malas pasadas.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufina guía a los Pitufos de caminata por la naturaleza, pero Puppy se adelantó demasiado y tras perseguirlo acaban en el territorio de los Wartmongers. El Rey de los Wartmongers acaba haciéndoles prisioneros en burbujas, pero un grupo de rebeldes les rescata y consiguen huir a lomos de Puppy.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Simón se ha perdido en el bosque buscando a sus padres, una pareja de gigantes. Los Pitufos tratarán de llevarlo de vuelta a su casa, pero gargamel aparecerá una vez más con no muy buenas intenciones.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos deben encontrar a una familia de conejos para tirar de su carroza durante el Festival de Otoño. Gargamel ve la oportunidad de capturar a los pequeños seres azules y se disfraza de conejo gigante. ¿Conseguirá atrapar a todos los Pitufos de un plumazo?

programme.title: La Abominable Bestia De La Nieve
programme.desc: Pitufo Filósofo y sus amigos organizan una jornada en la Montaña de Hielo para buscar la rara flor de la nieve para Papá Pitufo. Encuentran una terrorífica bestia de la nieve, pero acaban siendo amigos gracias a la amabilidad de Pitufina, y les ayuda a encontrar la minúscula flor.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Armonía ya no es bienvenido en el coro de los Pitufos: canta de una manera demasiado desafinada. Sin embargo, Papá Pitufo le entrega un amuleto que le convertirá en un virtuoso del canto. Y, por si fuera poco, aquí llega Hogata…

programme.title: El Pitufo Reportero
programme.desc: Pitufo Curioso ha tenido una idea: ¿por qué no imprimir un boletín con todas las noticias de la aldea? Está seguro de que sus cotilleos sobre los Pitufos interesarán a todos los lectores. Pero las cosas no salen exactamente según lo previsto cuando Papá Pitufo encuentra superpitufrutas.

programme.title: ¿Cómo Hacer Un Arcoíris?
programme.desc: La madre naturaleza está demasiado ocupada para evocar un Arcoíris para el Festival de los Pitufos, así que Papá Pitufo pide prestado su libro de cocina para realizar la mezcla él mismo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La producción teatral de los Pitufos "Pitufo Robin" se convierte en realidad con un actor real del legendario héroe.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Papá Pitufo recuerda las emocionantes aventuras de Soñador en el mar, con tortugas, ballenas, islas desiertas…y piratas!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Es cierto: lo bueno en exceso puede ser malo. Cuando se produce un accidente que afecta a la fórmula mágica de Papá Pitufo y este acaba duplicado, los Pitufos se muestran encantados: dos Papás Pitufo pueden dar el doble de buenos consejos y el doble de amor que uno solo. Sin embargo, después de un tiempo, las cosas se complican en exceso en la aldea. ¡Sobre todo cuando otro accidente hace que Gargamel también se duplique!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Perezoso sueña que está en la Isla Paraíso y libre de todo el trabajo que Papá Pitufo le impone. Su fantasía se vuelve una pesadilla que lo hace volver a trabajar nuevamente con afán.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La malvada bruja se transforma en Pitufo para vengarse de ellos por destruir su amuleto mágico.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Filósofo está horrorizado. Sasita no sabe leer, por lo que podría estar condenada a perderse las perlas de sabiduría que contiene su libro «Citas de Pitufo Filósofo». Así pues, intenta enseñarla a leer. Sin embargo, resulta que casi lo primero que puede leer es una fórmula para hacer que todos los libros desaparezcan. Todos los libros del mundo, ¡incluidos el libro de hechizos de Gargamel y los libros de remedios de Ómnibus!

programme.title: El Cuerno De La Abundancia
programme.desc: Madre Naturaleza siempre da lo mejor de sí misma, pero esta vez algo ha salido mal. Su varita no funciona según lo previsto y daña por accidente la cosecha otoñal. Ahora, los Pitufos y todos los animales del bosque se enfrentan a la escasez y el hambre de cara al invierno. El único lugar donde los Pitufos podrían obtener comida sería la Tierra de la Abundancia. Sin embargo, Gargamel roba el famoso Cuerno de la Abundancia para tender una trampa a los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio inventa a Pituforobotín para que ayude a todos los Pitufos en sus labores, pero Filósofo lo reprograma para que abandone la Aldea Pitufo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Poeta y Pintor se sienten poco valorados y huyen a una isla tormentosa sin saber que Gargamel los sigue hasta allí.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando el hada de las flores aparece en el pueblo de los Pitufos, todos se enamoran de su encanto e inteligencia. Y pronto se darán cuenta de que se convertirá en una especie de mamá pitufo para todos…

programme.title: La Pitufivisión De Genio
programme.desc: Pitufo Minero rebusca bajo todas las piedras y, gracias a ello, descubre un cristal que transmite imágenes. Esto permite a Pitufo Carpintero inventar la pitufivisión y, desde ese momento, los Pitufos pueden ver todas las mañanas los entrenamientos de Pitufo Fortachón, los informes de las cosechas de Pitufo Labrador e incluso el programa de Pitufo Filósofo. Pero ¿quién podría haberlo imaginado? ¡El malvado mago Gargamel se aprovecha de la pitufivisión para atrapar Pitufos!

programme.title: A Todas Las Criaturas Grandes Y Pequeñas
programme.desc: Pitufo Natural está convencido de que puede ayudar a todas las criaturas con sus dones curativos, incluso al malvado Azrael, cuya pata queda atrapada en una trampa. El gato se cura y, a pesar de que tiene la tentación de quedarse con los Pitufos, regresa con Gargamel, pero conduce a su dueño hacia un lugar alejado de la Aldea Pitufa.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Creyendo que Bebé Pitufo es un duende, dos cazadores furtivos lo secuestran e intentan que el pequeño les diga dónde ha escondido la olla de oro. Papá Pitufo organiza a todos para atacar a los villanos con tartas de pitufrutas y lograr que Bebé Pitufo pueda escapar.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufina ha encontrado a una nueva amiga, Laura, una niña de seis años de edad cuyos padres viven cerca del bosque. Juntas, las dos niñas se pasean por el bosque. Pero una vieja bruja que vive en el bosque las captura.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel vuelve a estar en problemas. Si no puede reunir una enorme cantidad de oro para el atardecer, le arrebatarán todas sus posesiones. Sin embargo, los Pitufos van a ayudar a su archienemigo… hasta cierto punto.

programme.title: Aquel Que Pitufa El Último…
programme.desc: Pitufo Bromista se pasa de la raya con sus bromas cuando Clorhidris cae víctima de una de ellas. Para vengarse de los Pitufos, crea un hechizo para robar su sentido del humor. Pitufo Gruñón, que ya de por sí no tenía sentido del humor, se hace con la poción de humor y rompe el hechizo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel está decidido a sobrevolar la Aldea Pitufa para atrapar a un Pitufo y llevarlo a la Convención de los Magos, e invoca a su libro de hechizos para que le ayude. Esto da lugar a una serie de divertidos contratiempos con su máquina voladora, y Gargamel vuelve a convertirse en el hazme reír de la Convención de los Magos.

programme.title: Narices Nuevas
programme.desc: A Pitufo Vanidoso no le gusta tener la misma nariz azul que el resto de los Pitufos. Necesita algo especial… Narizota, la prometida de Gigantón, también quiere cambiar su nariz. Y lo mismo le sucede a Gargamel. Así que se produce un intercambio de narices…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando el Pitufo Filósofo pierde sus gafas deja caer las cosas, tropieza con los objetos, y se convierte en tan patoso como el Pitufo Tontín, que ahora tiene que leer a Filósofo y ayudarle a manejarse. Esta experiencia hace que Filósofo se sienta culpable por la forma en la que siempre se ha burlado de Tontín. Una vez que recibe un nuevo par de gafas, le trata con más respeto.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Primera Palabra De Bebe Pitufo
programme.desc: Los Pitufitos liberan a los Pitufos de las garras de Gargamel justo a tiempo para llevar a Bebé Pitufo a la ceremonia de su primera palabra. Bebé Pitufo pronuncia la palabra «Gargamel». Papá Pitufo afirma que esa palabra indica que Bebé Pitufo se convertirá un día en un gran líder, ya que significa que es consciente de los peligros de la vida.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Natural y Travieso roban la fórmula de Gargamel para hacer otro Pitufo - otra pitufa para acompañar a Pitufina. Así pues, crean a Sassette, que crea problemas por doquier. Haciendo uso de su poción, Papá Pitufo convierte la malvada creación de Gargamel en una simpática Sassette.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: ¡Pitufo Torpe ha desenterrado una extraña piedra! En ella, puede ver los eventos que van a suceder… ¡No obstante, conocer parte del futuro a veces trae mala suerte!

programme.title: Que Suerte Tan Torpe
programme.desc: Los Pitufos descubren la superstición cuando Pitufo Torpe rompe el espejo de Pitufo Vanidoso antes de una lluvia de meteoritos. Un meteorito cae sobre la casa de Pitufo Torpe y todos lo atribuyen a la mala suerte. Sin embargo, se dan cuenta de lo descabellado de ese pensamiento cuando comprueban que Pitufo Torpe no estaba dentro de casa en ese momento.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Busqueda De La Piedra Magica
programme.desc: En el lejano Valle de Nodrog, los Pitufos se encuentran con El Molians, que quiere conseguir la Pitufo-Piedra que Papá Pitufo necesita para curar.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: En su plan por librarse de los Pitufos, Gargamel le lanza un hechizo a Gigantón y se disfraza de Pitufo. Creyendo que es un Pitufo, Gigantón está a punto de destrozar por completo la Aldea Pitufa hasta que Papá Pitufo acude con una cura.

programme.title: Cosas Que Putifan En La Noche
programme.desc: Cuando Pitufo Colérico pierde a su oso de peluche Huggy, no consigue dormir a pesar de los esfuerzos de Papá Pitufo por convencerle de que los osos de peluche son mágicos y pueden cuidar de sí mismos. Gargamel se tropieza con la Aldea Pitufa y Huggy regresa convertido en un oso gigante para espantar y salvar a Pitufo Colérico.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Otra estupenda producción del teatro de los Pitufos basada en los personajes de Alejandro Dumas. Incluye algunas líneas de Romeo y Julieta. Una obra maestra de la escena.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Papá Pitufo recuerda las emocionantes aventuras de Soñador en el mar, con tortugas, ballenas, islas desiertas…y piratas!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Tontín y Pitufina son capturados para ser exhibidos en una Feria. Papá Pitufo aprovecha la torpeza de Gargamel para rescatarlos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel está decidido a sobrevolar la Aldea Pitufa para atrapar a un Pitufo y llevarlo a la Convención de los Magos, e invoca a su libro de hechizos para que le ayude. Esto da lugar a una serie de divertidos contratiempos con su máquina voladora, y Gargamel vuelve a convertirse en el hazme reír de la Convención de los Magos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Un monstruo del pantano secuestra a Bebé Pitufo como regalo para una bruja. La bruja, que cree que nadie la ama, se sorprende cuando Bebé Pitufo le demuestra afecto. Cuando Papá Pitufo acude a rescatar a Bebé Pitufo, consigue que la bruja entienda que el leal monstruo del pantano siempre la ha amado.

programme.title: ¡alarma, Pitufos!
programme.desc: Los Pitufitos se sienten poco queridos y deciden huir. Se llevan consigo objetos que les recuerden su hogar, lo que hace que los Pitufos crean que hay un ladrón entre ellos. Pitufo Filósofo intenta atrapar al ladrón instalando pitufialarmas. Las alarmas provocan un estruendo que atrae a los Pitufitos de vuelta a casa, donde Papá Pitufo les convence de que los quieren.

programme.title: La Carrera De Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Carpintero ha ideado un nuevo invento: el pitufimóvil. Todos los Pitufos tienen su propio vehículo personalizado y todos (o casi todos) disfrutan dando una vuelta en ellos. Sin embargo, el malvado mago Gargamel se aprovecha de la idea y empieza a causar problemas a los Pitufos…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio ha decidido dedicarse al bienestar de los demás Pitufos. Va a curarles de todos sus males…con la ayuda del malvado Gargamel!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado primo del Rey, Malcolm, lo ha convertido en un ciervo negro para poder acabar con él y ponerle en su sala de trofeos. Los Pitufos irán a ayudar a su amigo y, tras devolver al Rey a su verdadera forma, Malcom acabará preso dentro del cuerpo del ciervo negro.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hogatha se disfraza de premio de oro para observar a los Pitufos y capturarlos para sus ingredientes de belleza. Vanidoso acaba convenciéndola de que pruebe su receta y acaba cubierta de barro de vuelta a casa de Gargamel.

programme.title: Corazón De Oro
programme.desc: No importa lo que diga Pitufo Filósofo: Pitufo Robotín, la creación de Pitufo Carpintero, tiene sentimientos como cualquier Pitufo normal. O al menos eso parece… hasta que Pitufo Robotín pierde aquello que Pitufo Carpintero había colocado en su caja torácica: un corazón de oro. El malvado mago Gargamel y su aprendiz Escrupuloso encuentran al pequeño autómata y le colocan un corazón de piedra, lo que augura malos tiempos para los Pitufos…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Para demostrar lo válido que es su «Gran libro de supervivencia en la naturaleza», Pitufo Filósofo se lleva a los Pitufitos al pantano. Allí, gracias a su experto consejo, el pequeño grupo se extravía, queda atrapado en arenas movedizas y es capturado por el Rey Verrugoso. Afortunadamente, el Rey Verrugoso está con ganas de jugar y decide hacer una caza del Pitufo. Desafortunadamente, Pitufo Filósofo cree que es un líder por naturaleza…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: ¿Qué contiene la caja que ha encontrado Pitufo Bromista? Una capa que perteneció a Wislow, el gnomo mago. ¿Y de qué tipo de capa se trata? Pitufo Bromista descubre que es una capa de invisibilidad. Cualquiera que la lleve puesta tendrá una oportunidad fantástica para hacer bromas… e imagina el caos que puede crear Pitufo Bromista siendo invisible en la aldea. Pero si Wislow se desprendió de la capa, seguro que tenía sus motivos…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Si hay algo que la malvada hechicera Clorhidris no puede soportar es la felicidad de las demás personas. Contemplar la vida de los Pitufos, llena de amabilidad y canciones, pone furiosa a Clorhidris. Debe destruir esas risas y ahogar esas felices conversaciones… Entonces, planta la raíz del mal en el bosque y, poco después, todos los Pitufos dejan de hablarse. El único que no se ha visto afectado es Bebé Pitufo…

programme.title: Cuidando A Pies Grandes
programme.desc: ¿Recuerdas al ogro Gigantón y a su encantadora esposa Narizota? Ahora tienen un bebé: el pequeño (según los estándares de los ogros) Pies Grandes. Como a los Pitufitos no les permiten cuidar de Bebé Pitufo, Pitufo Colérico, Pitufo Blandengue, Pitufo Natural y la siempre dispuesta Sasita se ofrecen a vigilar a Pies Grandes mientras sus padres están en el baile de los ogros. Los Pitufitos conseguirán más de lo que esperaban…

programme.title: Peligro En La Aldea
programme.desc: El pérfido mago Gargamel está harto de la constante superioridad de los Pitufos. Decide destruir su aldea de una vez por todas. Con ese fin, entrena una termita para que destroce, demuela, devaste y destruya todas las casas que se encuentre en su camino. Sin embargo, los efectos son mucho peores de lo que Gargamel había imaginado, ya que los Pitufos creen que las travesuras de los Pitufitos son las que están destruyendo su aldea.

programme.title: La Fórmula Aniquiladora
programme.desc: Existe una palabra mágica aterradora. Cuando pronuncias esa palabra hacia algo o alguien, ¡haces que se desvanezca en la nada! ¿Podrán los Pitufos anular su malvado poder antes de que Gargamel se apropie de ella?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Creyendo que Bebé Pitufo es un duende, dos cazadores furtivos lo secuestran e intentan que el pequeño les diga dónde ha escondido la olla de oro. Papá Pitufo organiza a todos para atacar a los villanos con tartas de pitufrutas y lograr que Bebé Pitufo pueda escapar.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Las pinturas del malvado Maestro son capaces de tele portar a sus modelos dentro del cuadro…para siempre! Papá pitufo le dice a Pintor que cambie las pinturas y en poco tiempo Maestro acaba dentro de uno de sus cuadros, al lado de su modelo de ensueño: Pitufina.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Es la primera Navidad de Pitufo Salvaje y está impresionado por la decoración de la Aldea Pitufa. Pero Abuelo Pitufo y Sasita van a enseñarle el auténtico significado de la Navidad cuando ayudan a una pareja de ancianos a disfrutar de la Navidad más hermosa que jamás hayan vivido…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Es cierto: lo bueno en exceso puede ser malo. Cuando se produce un accidente que afecta a la fórmula mágica de Papá Pitufo y este acaba duplicado, los Pitufos se muestran encantados: dos Papás Pitufo pueden dar el doble de buenos consejos y el doble de amor que uno solo. Sin embargo, después de un tiempo, las cosas se complican en exceso en la aldea. ¡Sobre todo cuando otro accidente hace que Gargamel también se duplique!

programme.title: Dilo Por Ti Mismo, Granjero
programme.desc: Pitufo Labrador esconde su amor por Pitufina ocultándose en el anonimato y enviándole poemas. Cuando finalmente se encuentran, Gigantón les captura y, en sus esfuerzos por escapar, descubren su afecto mutuo.

programme.title: La Fórmula Aniquiladora
programme.desc: Existe una palabra mágica aterradora. Cuando pronuncias esa palabra hacia algo o alguien, ¡haces que se desvanezca en la nada! ¿Podrán los Pitufos anular su malvado poder antes de que Gargamel se apropie de ella?

programme.title: Los Amigos De Soñador
programme.desc: Cuando Pitufo Soñador decide visitar a sus amigos, los Tufos, Papá Pitufo crea una poción para transformar a los Pitufos en criaturas de aspecto alienígena. Sin embargo, los efectos de la poción desaparecen demasiado pronto y Pitufo Soñador tiene que enfrentarse a la realidad de que los Tufos no existen. Está triste hasta que llega un alienígena de verdad para devolver a Pitufo Soñador su carta, ya que la recibió por error.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos deben encontrar a una familia de conejos para tirar de su carroza durante el Festival de Otoño. Gargamel ve la oportunidad de capturar a los pequeños seres azules y se disfraza de conejo gigante. ¿Conseguirá atrapar a todos los Pitufos de un plumazo?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Para tratar de descubrir dónde se encuentra el escondite secreto de diamantes de los Pitufos, Gargamel finge ser su amigo. Cuando muestra su verdadera naturaleza malvada, Papá Pitufo conjura un hechizo mágico para salvar a sus pequeños Pitufos de las garras maliciosas del mago malvado.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Patoso y sus desventuras le llevan a través de un río a un lugar desconocido. Allí conoce a las duendecillas, unas adorables criaturitas cuyos enemigos acabarán encontrándose con los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Pitufo Marco Y Los Piratas Pimienta
programme.desc: Los Pitufos navegan para salvar a Marco, que ha sido capturado por el Capitán Pedro Pimienta. Marina y un delfín acaban liberando a Marco.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Mientras los pitufos construyen cápsulas del tiempo para guardar sus talentos, Papá Pitufo está tratando desesperadamente de acertar un acertijo druídico antes de que un gran desastre llegue al bosque.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cada mañana, los duendecillos del agua depositan rocío sobre las hojas del bosque. No imaginas todo lo que ocurrirá cuando Pitufo Miedoso se transforme con la varita mágica que crea las gotas de rocío…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Cama Voladora De Papa Pitufo
programme.desc: Gargamel lanza un hechizo a la nueva cama de Papá Pitufo para que cualquiera que duerma en ella sea transportado al lugar con el que esté soñando. Los ensueños de los Pitufos les llevan a un barco, un castillo y, por último, hasta Gargamel. Consiguen escapar cuando Pitufo Torpe se queda dormido y sueña con su hogar.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Todos sabemos que Pitufo Gruñón odia varias cosas. Pero la cosa que odia más que nada es el agua, cuando hay suficiente para que se pueda ahogar. Pitufo Gruñón no sabe nadar. Y cuando los Pitufos notan esto y le tratan de enseñar cómo sobrevivir en el agua, el malvado mago Gargamel hace que todo sea un poco más peligroso de lo que debería ser...

programme.title: No Puedo Pitufar La Música
programme.desc: No hay nada que la hechicera Clorhidris odie tanto como el amor en el mundo. Le gustaría que el amor desapareciera de la faz de la tierra y, para conseguirlo, ha decidido comenzar por la música. Lanza un hechizo a un cuerno mágico que absorberá la melodía de las canciones… en especial, de las canciones de los Pitufos. Con la ayuda de su amiga Laconia, es posible que los Pitufos consigan echar por tierra el malvado plan de Clorhidris…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La encantadora Allura posee una esfera mágica muy especial cuya energía, según ella misma dice, puede levantar el ánimo e inspirar a aquellos faltos de inspiración. Todo lo que hay que hacer es sostener la esfera con las manos… Es cierto que la esfera fomenta la inspiración, pero solo hasta cierto punto. Sin embargo, sus efectos secundarios pueden ser muy peligrosos, tal como descubren los Pitufos cuando se hacen adictos a la esfera…

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos descubren el espíritu deportivo, la alegría y la amista cuando llevan a cabo sus primeros "Juegos Pitufos". Los Pitufos deciden ponerse en forma tras casi perder contra el gato Azrael.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos descubren una Fuente de la Juventud cuidada por un espantoso Troll que roba el libro mágico de Papá Pitufo.

programme.title: La Abominable Bestia De La Nieve
programme.desc: Pitufo Filósofo y sus amigos organizan una jornada en la Montaña de Hielo para buscar la rara flor de la nieve para Papá Pitufo. Encuentran una terrorífica bestia de la nieve, pero acaban siendo amigos gracias a la amabilidad de Pitufina, y les ayuda a encontrar la minúscula flor.

programme.title: 10 Mejores
programme.desc: Hola y bienvenidos a 10 mejores, donde contamos los diez mejores videos más divertidos de la semana.

programme.title: El Top 8
programme.desc: Hola y bienvenido El Top Ocho, donde contamos los ocho videos más divertidos de la semana!

programme.title: El Top 8
programme.desc: Hola y bienvenido El Top Ocho, donde contamos los ocho videos más divertidos de la semana!

programme.title: El Top 8
programme.desc: Hola y bienvenido El Top Ocho, donde contamos los ocho videos más divertidos de la semana!

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Prepárese para ver algunos videoclips histéricos y trepidantes enviados por espectadores que comparten los momentos más divertidos de sus mascotas y personas favoritas.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Prepárese para ver algunos videoclips histéricos y trepidantes enviados por espectadores que comparten los momentos más divertidos de sus mascotas y personas favoritas.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People

programme.title: Sonic X
programme.desc: A slight malfunction causes Chaos Control, and sends Sonic the Hedgehog to Earth. While there, Sonic meets Chris Thorndyke, who helps in collecting the Chaos Emeralds, so Sonic and friends can go home.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros. Wonder
programme.desc: Mario and friends are invited to the Flower Kingdom by its ruler, Prince Florian, when Bowser suddenly appears, along with Kamek and Bowser Jr.! Bowser then takes hold of the Wonder Flower, merging himself, his Koopa Clown Car, and Prince Florian's castle to become a flying fortress, wreaking havoc across the land and trapping the Poplins in their homes. Abdallah plays as Mario and friends and sets off on a journey to defeat Bowser and save the Flower Kingdom in Super Mario Bros. Wonder on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Sonic Superstars
programme.desc: Adventure through the mystical Northstar Islands and harness all-new Emerald powers to move and attack in dynamic new ways. Navigate gorgeous, never-before-seen environments and stop Dr. Eggman, Fang, and a mysterious new adversary from converting the islands' giant animals into Badniks before it's too late! Watch as Abdallah plays as Sonic and friends in Sonic Superstars on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Princess Peach: Showtime!
programme.desc: Princess Peach sets off to save the Sparkle Theater from Grape and the Sour Bunch. The guardian fairy of the Sparkle Theater, Stella, assists Peach by giving her usage of Sparkle power and allowing her to transform. Abdallah plays as Princess Peach in Princess Peach: Showtime! on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Super Mario RPG
programme.desc: Enter a world of whimsy with Mario on a quest to repair Star Road and defeat the troublemaking Smithy Gang, who has crashed into their world and scattered the 7 Star Pieces of Star Road. Abdallah plays as Mario and teams up with a party of unlikely allies, like the monstrous Bowser and a mysterious doll named Geno, in Super Mario RPG on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Minecraft videos with JeromeASF
programme.desc: Welcome to my channel! I love playing Minecraft, Fortnite and a bunch of other games. My goal is to have as much fun as possible and provide entertaining videos for everyone! I hope you all enjoy!

programme.title: Minecraft, Roblox and More with Amy Lee
programme.desc: Hey Guys! I am Amy Lee! Welcome to my Channel! Check it out for videos on Minecraft, Roblox, The Sims plus oth

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Take it slow with this model railroad tour.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Watch JJR make ombré fondant ruffles and stud this cake with incredible custom "gems."

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Watch JJR make ombré fondant ruffles and stud this cake with incredible custom "gems."

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Joshua John Russell creates modern, edible masterpieces with cake, fondant and buttercream.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Celebrate a love that's out of this world with Joshua John Russell's "cosmic love" illustrated cake!

programme.title: Butter Book
programme.desc: Learn to bake and cook with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Garden Party
programme.desc: Ready to dig in and grow your green thumb? Join us for a delightful hour of expert-led gardening tutorials designed to inspire and educate gardeners of all levels. From essential planting tips and soil secrets to creative container gardening and vibrant floral arrangements, our seasoned instructors will guide you through every step. Whether you're a seasoned horticulturist or just starting out, you'll find fresh ideas and practical techniques to cultivate the garden of your dreams.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Let's make wings and fly. With paper, scissors and a little spaghetti, Jenny Barnett-Rohrs makes paper feathers. Then, she crafts fuzzy bug wings from felt. Artist Franz Spohn illustrates distance and perspective in his drawings of birds in flight. Jenny crafts a bird house for our feathered friends.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Our creativity takes to the air. Jenny Barnett-Rohrs and Katie Hacker make sparkly wings and Katie creates a funny spoon bird. Franz Spohn creates see-through bug wings and we'll make a very special chalkboard gift for Mom or Dad.

programme.title: Composition Essentials For Outdoor Photography
programme.desc: Learn photography with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Vanilla & Beyond: Baking With Flavors First
programme.desc: Learn to bake with CraftsyTV

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: CAUTION: Baby quilts are a total gateway drug! Just ask Angela: she's working this cute little number up for her newborn nephew. (Think you can stop at one? Don't say we didn't warn you!)

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: This one's a total strip show! (Well, sort of.) Angela's strip-piecing secrets can help you breeze through the blocks, sashing and border of a beautiful quilt.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: In the final episode of the Holiday Gift-Along, your last-minute gift quilter, Angela Walters, is making a beginner-friendly criss cross quilt. This gift-able quilt project is much easier than it looks, so you still have time to make it before the holidays!

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Don't you love that feeling when you use up every bit of fabric for a quilt? Tune in as Angela blazes the path to a stash-neutral quilt that leaves no scrap behind.

programme.title: Craft Hacks
programme.desc: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.

programme.title: Baking & Cooking
programme.desc: Learn to bake and cook with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Take a walk on the wild side with some unique projects on this episode. First, Emily Thompson creates a quilted tablet cover - a perfect beginner project. Then, Cheryl Sleboda, our cosplay expert, has a novel idea for cosplay or plain fun: winged feet, you'll love these fun additions to your shoes. Last, Angela Wolf shares an optional addition to the wrap dress and a built-in tank top.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.sub-title: Quilt Techniques for all Types of Sewing
programme.desc: We apply quilting concepts to all sorts of different finished projects from pillows to skirts on this show. If you're a fashion sewer, quilting is a little break from fitting and if you're a quilter we have garments that incorporate your techniques in garments. First, Paula Reid shares her creative method for doing trapunto. Then, Jeni Baker has an easy but modern feeling quilt project -- this time it's the log cabin as coasters. Finally, Angela Wolf takes a quilt technique for seaming and uses it on a patchwork style skirt.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.desc: Hold onto your needles! Tracie and Jodi, are here to dish out fresh fiber inspiration. From project picks to wooly good gossip, things are about to get super knitty… and maybe just a little nutty.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.sub-title: Knit NICER! How to Knit Canadian Style
programme.desc: What's the nicest style of knitting? Canadian, of course! Join Tracie and Jodi for a lesson in knitting styles, and find out what it takes to knit like a Canadian!

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.sub-title: Knit NICER! How to Knit Canadian Style
programme.desc: What's the nicest style of knitting? Canadian, of course! Join Tracie and Jodi for a lesson in knitting styles, and find out what it takes to knit like a Canadian!

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.desc: Beat single sock syndrome with a little multitasking! The girls go over how to knit two socks at once so you'll never end up with solo socks again.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Let's turn toward ourselves for creative ideas. When she makes a lighted mirror, Jenny Barnett-Rohrs makes you a star. Katie Hacker makes personal paper dolls and Franz Spohn draws a 3D self-portrait. Jenny celebrates Thanksgiving with Pilgrim-style table decorations.

programme.title: Composition Essentials For Outdoor Photography
programme.desc: Learn photography with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Sink your teeth into current cake decorating trends! In the Man About Cake series, Joshua John Russell delivers incredible tips for creating modern edible masterpieces. Each week, he decorates an original cake, shares his favorite recipes and gives pointers for designing like a pro.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: No piping? No problem. Check out JJR's cake hacks to make a faux piped royal icing cake accented with a sugar poppy.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Joshua John Russell creates modern, edible masterpieces with cake, fondant and buttercream.

programme.title: Mother's Day Gift Box Cake
programme.desc: Yo mama's so sweet...We made a cake for her! Tune in as JJR whips up a gorgeous gift box cake that might make up for all those grey hairs you gave Mom.

programme.title: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
programme.sub-title: Making a Long-Bow in Your Shop
programme.desc: Master bowyer Tom Turgeon joins George Vondriska in the workshop to show you how to make your own long-bow. They'll discuss the kits available on the market and demystify the terminology used when talking about bow making. Learn about the art and intricac

programme.title: Fresh Quilting
programme.desc: Use shapes in new ways. Modern Quilt Guild marketing director Heather Grant discusses the modern quilt aesthetic and modern quilt designs. Blogger Rossie Hutchinson joins quilter Elizabeth Dackson to talk about improv quilt events. Instructor Rebecca Kemp Brent uses the latest cutting and quilting technology to create a confetti star quilt design.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela's reminded of her age as she relies on her kids to keep up with the digital world. Watch as she uses two basic shapes to create a mod half-square triangle quilt that's easier to make than it looks.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Wish you could make your quilting mistakes disappear? Angela is here to show you how. Well, at least how to hide them by using a matching thread color, echoing and repeating a mistake to make it look intentional.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela's been challenged by The Crafty Gemini to make a stash-busting tote bag. So she's stepping outside her comfort zone and up to the #MidnightStashChallenge!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Vintage styles continue to cycle thru our wardrobes with subtle updates. Gretchen Hirsch epitomizes that vintage style with a lace bolero. Then, it's Kim Montagnese. Watch as she recycles a jacket with vintage details and demonstrates techniques for adding trims, lace and more. The show closes with Joanne Banko sharing tips for cutting and sewing silky fabrics.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Show off your style, when you create table top glamour. Your table is the star with this table setting from Rebecca Kemp Brent. Create beautiful accents and all over patterns using a frame. Then meet Joanne Hillestad and a beautiful table runner. This quick project personalizes your décor by season or color. Finally Angela is back with another tank variation; this time it's a lace insert.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: With a few supplies and cold connection techniques, designer Abbi Berta quickly creates mixed media earrings. She also makes a textured cuff with a torch-fired patina to introduce metalwork. Viewer Leslie Rocha tells how her first jewelry class and love of music blossomed into a passion for making jewelry from guitar wire and picks.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Express your style in metalwork and with lettering, too. Mary Hettmansperger adds a window in metal work to make a versatile bezel. She adds style by layering metals and putting a variety of motifs behind the window. Creative collaborator Brenda Schweder shares her favorite tips on soldering metalwork. Katie Hacker puts her style into words with lettering in Katie's Beading Lesson.

programme.title: Scrapbook Soup
programme.desc: Soup would be pretty boring if it was just broth. Scrapbook pages might also suffer the same fate without some interesting add-ons to rev them up. Explore beyond the norm with media mixage with Stacey Caron, add bezels, ribbon and buttons to create texture and dimension. Make a die cut frame with Jenny Barnett Rohrs and use up scraps of patterned paper in a grid design with Ronda Palazzari. Today's Scrapbook Soup is stocked with new ingredients.

programme.title: Chemo Caps
programme.desc: Learn to knit with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Knitting
programme.desc: Learn to knit with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: All quilters can get stuck in a creative rut, even Angela. This week, she turns to strip piecing and her fun, easy-to-piece chevron pattern to get her quilting mojo back. Plus, she'll show you how to use negative space to bring your quilt to life.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: This is not a drill! Angela has heard your requests loud and clear, and she's finally making the Bargello quilt that everyone's been asking for! So break out the layer cakes and prepare to get crazy with precuts.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela's back and bursting with love. In this season premiere, she uses half-square triangles to make a modern bursting star quilt while sharing her tips on how to keep a lasting relationship with a quilter.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: This week Angela is preparing to host a dinner for quilters, so of course, she has to quilt up a few placemats!

programme.title: Butter Book
programme.desc: Learn to bake and cook with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Craft Hacks
programme.desc: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Sewing experts offer easy ways to create neat sewing projects right at home. Viewers of all skill levels learn tips and techniques for creating professional-looking garments, personalized apparel and home accents. Weekly episodes feature various themes, and feature two main projects and one shorter technique segment. Some projects include monogramming napkins and towels; baby poncho, hooded towel and baby-friendly diapers; embellishing yoga pants with a clothing tattoo; and sewing on knits.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: It's graduation day at chef school and Matt and the team are sharing in the festivities; to congratulate the new Chefs, Matt has cooked up a masterful menu of fancy, yet simple, dishes.

programme.title: Road Grill

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners

programme.title: Cooking Panda
programme.desc: Welcome to Cooking Panda, your culinary hub inspired by shows like "Say Cheese," "Cakes & Cupcakes," "Sugar Rush," and more. Explore cheesemaking, indulge in sweet treats, and make cooking fun. Join "Liv B" for vegan twists, enroll in Cooking Panda Academy, and savor homemade bread with Chef Ale Gambini. Discover the joys of food with us!

programme.title: Award-Winning Weddings
programme.desc: Love is love—and while every couple is eligible to win any Wedding Film Award, this award is specifically designed to spotlight the inspiring love of our LGBTQ+ couples through a film that is as timeless as it is alluring. programme.title: World's Best Wedding Venues
programme.desc: Join us in Episode 2 of World's Best Wedding Venues to learn about unique wedding venues Lac La Belle and Aurora Farms.

programme.title: Award-Winning Weddings
programme.desc: We're always looking for up-and-coming talent. This category is designed to recognize a fresh filmmaker on the scene who has nonetheless demonstrated exceptional filmmaking skills and pushed the creative envelope in our industry. This episode contains finalists from the 2024 Wedding Film Awards.

programme.title: Award-Winning Weddings
programme.desc: What's more enchanting than a themed wedding, where love and imagination unite? From whimsical Halloween affairs to epic Star Wars spectacles, and the mysteries of Masquerade to the enchantment of Alice in Wonderland – the possibilities are boundless, and so is the amusement. This episode contains finalists from the 2024 Wedding Film Awards.

programme.title: Award-Winning Weddings
programme.desc: An awe-inspiring venue creates a whole vibe that an astounding wedding can be built around. The Best Venue award goes to the video where the venue takes center stage and shines throughout. This episode contains finalists from the 2024 Wedding Film Awards.

programme.title: Award-Winning Weddings
programme.desc: No long-winded boring speeches or cookie cutter vows here! The Best Speech Or Vows award goes to the video that showcases a speech or vow that leave us in awe. Speeches can be emotional, hilarious, sweet and tear-inducing. Personalized vows can show us everything about a couple in a few well thought out sentences. The words and sentiment of an amazing speech or spectacular vows will last long after the walk down the aisle is over and the last glasses have been clinked. This episode contains finalists from the 2024 Wedding Film Awards.

programme.title: Award-Winning Weddings
programme.desc: South Asian weddings, often spanning multiple days, brim with family, tradition, and vibrant celebrations. Imbued with rich culture, these weddings manifest in diverse settings, from grand ballrooms to intimate backyards and luxurious destinations. The Best South Asian Wedding award recognizes the video that profoundly captivates us, both visually and emotionally. This episode contains finalists from the 2024 Wedding Film Awards.

programme.title: Award-Winning Weddings
programme.desc: Editing a film that captures viewers and distills a full video into a coherent narrative for social media is an art unto itself. The finalists in this category will deliver a viral-worth video for TikTok, Instagram, or other platforms. This episode contains finalists from the 2024 Wedding Film Awards.

programme.title: Award-Winning Weddings
programme.desc: Not to contradict Coco Chanel, but dress impeccably and they most certainly do remember the dress, tux, or shoes. This award recognizes the film that perfectly captures how fashion sets the tone for a wedding: from Bohemian to sharply tailored—and everything in between. This episode contains finalists from the 2024 Wedding Film Awards.

programme.title: Award-Winning Weddings
programme.desc: A great soundtrack is crucial to delivering a film that captures our emotions. These films employ music to take the content from great to exceptional through a transcendent audio journey using music to both set the mood and capture the spirit of the wedding celebration. This episode contains finalists from the 2024 Wedding Film Awards.

programme.title: Award-Winning Weddings
programme.desc: Featuring the work of the most elite wedding filmmakers from across the globe, Award-Winning Weddings features finalists from our annual Love Stories TV Wedding Film Awards.

programme.title: Award-Winning Weddings
programme.sub-title: Award Winning Weddings: Best New Filmmakers
programme.desc: Featuring the work of the most elite wedding filmmakers from across the globe, Award-Winning Weddings features finalists from our annual Love Stories TV Wedding Film Awards.

programme.title: Walt Before Mickey
programme.desc: A young man named Walt Disney had big dreams, and no matter how many obstacles he had to face he never gave up--from his tumultuous childhood, to serving his country, to borrowing money, to the creation of his first iconic animated character Mickey Mouse.

programme.title: Camp Cool Kids
programme.desc: At their summer camp competition games, Spence and his big brother Zach find themselves on opposing teams: its the dweebs against the bullies. Can Spence make new friends, overcome his fears and find faith in himself, stand up to the bullies and win a trophy in the process?

programme.title: Tentacle 8
programme.desc: A mysterious computer virus wipes out highly classified personnel files at the NSA, prompting a top secret investigation. Raymond Berry, an NSA operative suspected of crimes against the United States, risks his life to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Susie's Hope
programme.desc: Based on a true story, the inspirational relationship between Donna Lawrence (Emmanuelle Vaguer) a pit bull attack survivor, and Susie (Susie Lawrence), an abused pit bull-mix puppy, as they learn to heal and forgive together.

programme.title: Like Sunday, Like Rain
programme.desc: Surrounded by wealth and living with abundant resources in Manhattan, 12-year-old cello prodigy Reggie, lives a solitary life lacking only frequently absent parents and friends. Estranged from family, having slacker boyfriend troubles, and fired from her waitressing job, sometimes musician 23-year-old Eleanor needs a new place to live and a new job.

programme.title: Watercolor Postcards
programme.desc: A small town girl with a troubled past returns home only to find that both her sister and her hometown are in peril. Only when she falls for a man who similarly has dark days behind him will they muster up the faith and love needed to save the things they hold dear in life.

programme.title: Walt Before Mickey
programme.desc: A young man named Walt Disney had big dreams, and no matter how many obstacles he had to face he never gave up--from his tumultuous childhood, to serving his country, to borrowing money, to the creation of his first iconic animated character Mickey Mouse.

programme.title: Camp Cool Kids
