programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 15, Mexico World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: The first day of the two-part finale sees the strongest men competing in Carry and Drag, Dumbbell Lift and the Truck Pull. Everything is possible in this heated fight for the crown against the backdrop of stunning Chetumal, Mexico.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 16, Mexico World Finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: On the second day of the grand finale of the 2017 Strongman Champions League, the athletes have a last chance to secure the medals in the spectacular four events Weight for Height, Deadlift Cars, Forward Hold and The Loading Medley. Be prepared for stunning performances – and even world records!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 1, Norway - World Strongest Viking
programme.desc: Season 2018 begins with 14 strongest men in the world, all competing for the title. The competition kicks off in Norway. We’ll see typical Viking disciplines, team events and world records in heavy conditions in the land of snow and ice. They will suffer, they will freeze and fight in this first competition of the year for the title that they will carry on their shoulders throughout whole year.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 2, Germany - FIBO Power
programme.desc: The next stop in strongest league of the world is muscle capital, largest number of strong shoulders per capichampions league on the planet. It’s a FIBO - the biggest expo on planet Earth and the second stage of 2018 Strongman champions league, in Cologne, Germany.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: For the first time in history, Strongman Champions League will set up competition in Abu Dhabi. The line-up of super athletes, who are part of the SCL, includes former world champions Dainis Zageris (Latvia) & Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland), current world champion Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and biggest strongman in the World Sean O’Hagan (Ireland).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Strongman classic in land where there is no place for anything else excepts strength, fight and endurance. Here are fourteen of the strongest men, fighting for the title of strongest in Holland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We go back to Holland, where former champion Dainis Zageris is in leading position after the first three events. Alongside Radzikowski, he is in this moment favorite for world title, and also leader shirt holder.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stage six of Strongman champions league, 2018 is set back on north, in Finland. Here we have Matjaz Belsak, wearing SCL leader shirt, one of the biggest strongman in the World Mika Torro, fan favorite strongman in all over the World – Will Baggott, and also big name from Baltic – Aivars Smaukstelis

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Twelve strongman, including defending Worldchampion Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia , will compete on “Air spa” for the title of best in homeland country of Tesla, Pupin, Novak Djokovic. Matjaz Belsak is the SCL leader in this competition, chasing his third victory this season.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The World championship in lightweights of the Strongman Champions League bring to us 50 strongmen from all over the world. All athletes are under 105 kilograms and for them this is the step up to the ultimate heavyweights.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this second stage of the World championship of lightweights we will find out who out of the 12 athletes will win the title in the under 105 kilogram category.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The first part of SCL Romania 2018 will be hosted in Brasov. This episode features a new event for Strongman Champion League: “ The Chopper Pull”!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: After three classical Strongman events – Dead lift, Loading and Front hold – and one historical, Chopper Pull for the first time in history of Strongman, now we go to find out who will take title in Romania. This is the second stage in Romania and it remains to be seen who will win the title; Aivars, Travis or Krzyzstof?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next destination of Strongman Champions League is in a piece of paradise on earth – Curacao. We bring to you some special Strongman events like the Rock Lift, Tug of War and Weight for Height in this episode.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This is the last competition before the grand finals. After the first three events Zageris is in top place, but can O’Hagan, Baggott, Petursson and Ortmayer step into the final? Last chance some of them will find through events like Forward Hold, Truck Pull, Dead Lift and loading very big objects.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 14, Road to Mexico
programme.desc: We bring you 50 minutes of Strongman inside. Fears, inspiration, courage, the best and worst from our finalists and their expectation of the finals. We also go to Poland and Germany to represent one day in the training of Krzysztof Radzikowski and Dennis Kohlruss. See all the finalists for Mexico in their comfort zone here, with their backgrounds /motivations /family and friends.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 15, Mexico - World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: The first part of the Strongman Champions League 2018 finals in Mexico. The last twelve athletes all pushing their boundaries and testing their limits to take the World title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 16, Mexico - World Finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: After 11 months and 14 competitions all over the world, it all comes down to the final in this episode. The strongmen must show their best skills and every mistake is expensive, so their concentration must be at the highest possible level. Will Krzysztof manage to take off back or will Dainis maintain his lead?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 1, World Strongest Viking
programme.desc: This year 14 athletes from all over the world came to Fefor to compete in 6 cruel events. We'll see typical Viking disciplines on very heavy conditions in land of snow and ice, World records and athletes like the title defender Krzysztof Radzikowski, strongest guys from Holland and Germany and many more

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next stop in strongest league of the world is muscle capital, largest number of strong shoulders per capita in the World and of course, the most powerful host in Strongman champions league on the planet. It’s a FIBO - the biggest expo on planet Earth and the second stage of 2019 Strongman champions league, in Cologne, Germany.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: On a spectacular beach in Alanya, the MLO Strongman Champions League Turkey was viewed by thousands of spectators over a two day battle. With 12 athletes at the start over 6 cruel events, like Marble Stone Lift, Truckpull and Deadlift cars. And with the comeback of Travis Ortmayer / USA, former stone king and world ranked competitor. Winner of several SCL stages in the past.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Four times Strongest Man of Holland, Alex Moonen and the “Flying Dutchman” Kelvin de Ruiter competing here in Holland against 12 other strongest men in the world. There were 6 events in total, and 3 in this episode: The first event, a truckpull of 17.000 kg over 25 meters in max 75 seconds, was a real hard pull Also for the World Champion Truckpull, Holland’s runner-up Kelvin de Ruiter, but watch his amazing technique here.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Strongest Man of Holland, Alex Moonen and the “Flying Dutchman” Kelvin de Ruiter, competing in Holland against 12 other strongest men in the world. There were 6 events in total, 3 in this second episode; a Viking-press of 150 kg with the current world record holder Luke Herrick. The fifth event, a front hold of 25 kg is loved or hated by the athletes and lastly, the Stones of Strength.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: An unbelievable TANK PULL of 50.000 kg was at the stage of SCL RUSSIA. Never seen this before! Not only a tank pull was done here but also the Viking Press/ Deadlift Max and Log lift reps were spectacular events to see here in Russia. With Mikhail Koklyaev also as event presenter, the former top 3 world strongest man from Russia was there

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this year’s edition on The Balkan Peninsula, we have competing the new talent from Estonia Marko Remlik together with Sebastian Kurek from Poland and yellow leader Kelvin de Ruiter

programme.desc: A compilation of the best soul reads and hero calls. Featuring Avi Freedman, Mike Sigel, Danielle Andersen, Shaun Deeb, Samantha , Layne Flack,Abernathy, Mike Dentale, Cate Hall, Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Alec Torelli, Lauren Roberts.

programme.desc: $25/$50 cash game action from Seminole Hard Rock, Hollywood, FL featuring Mike Dentale, Joey DiPascale, Matt Glantz, Jonathan Little, Ethan "Rampage" Yau, and Shaun Deeb. (Part 3 of 5)

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.desc: Poker Night is back in action at Studio 52 in Las Vegas! Featuring Jason Somerville, MJ Gonzales, Lily Kiletto, Dan Shak, Johnnie Vibes, and Jesse Sylvia.

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.desc: The party continues at Studio 52 as we see one of the rarest hands in all of poker. Featuring commentary from Lon McEachern and Phil Galfond. Tonight's lineup: Maria Konnikova, MJ Gonzales, Johnnie Vibes, Darren Rabinowitz, Jesse Sylvia & Cedrric Trevino.

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.desc: Phil Galfond makes his Poker Night in America debut playing $25/$50/$100. Lineup: MJ Gonzales, Adam Hendrix, Phil Galfond, Bob Mather, Nick Vertucci, Jeremiah Williams. Commentary by Phil Galfond & Lon McEachern.

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.desc: It's LADIES NIGHT at Studio 52 and we're playing $25/$50+. This is one of the most unpredictable tables we've ever had. Featuring Lily Kiletto, Farah Galfond, Hayley Hanna, Christina 'BabyShark' Gollins, Aiza Sison & Lynn Banks! Commentary by Phil Galfond & Lon McEachern.

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.desc: MJ Gonzales reads through the soul of a 3-barrel bluff. What else would you expect from Daniel Negreanu's poker coach? Episode 5 features special guest Cody Daniels making his poker night debut. Full Line up: Cody Daniels, MJ Gonzales, Johnnie Vibes, DJ Washburn, Adam Hendrix, Nicky Ringz & Danny Panagatos.

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.desc: More $25/$50+ high stakes action from Studio 52 in Las Vegas. Lineup features MJ Gonzales, Adam Hendrix, Christian Soto, Jared Jaffee, Danny Panagatos & Mitchell Bank.

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.desc: Tensions rise on the felt as the poker action heats up in this wild $25/$50/$100 high stakes cash game from Studio 52 in Las Vegas. Lineup features Krissy Foxen, Christian Soto, Jared Jaffee, MJ Gonzales, Hayley Hanna & Christina McAlpin.

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.desc: The established PROS received BAD intel on Keir Sullivan, not realizing they invited a SHARK to their game. Wild high stakes action $100/$200. Lineup: Shaun Deeb, Ben Lamb, Keir Sullivan, MJ Gonzales, Shane Sigsbee, Craig Stackewicz, Clay Johnson. Commentary by Joe Stapleton.

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.desc: If anyone can stop Keir Sullivan's winning streak, it's Shaun Deeb...right? Wild high stakes action $100/$200. Lineup: Shaun Deeb, Ben Lamb, Keir Sullivan, MJ Gonzales, Shane Sigsbee, Craig Stackewicz, Clay Johnson. Commentary by Joe Stapleton.

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.desc: More high stakes $100/$200/$400+ featuring Shaun Deeb and friends with commentary from comedian Joe Stapleton - Season 10 Episode 10 filmed in Las Vegas, NV (November 2023). Lineup: Shaun Deeb, Ben Lamb, Keir Sullivan, MJ Gonzales, Shane Sigsbee, Craig Stackewicz, Clay Johnson. Commentary by Joe Stapleton.

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.desc: Table Finale of the $100/$200/$400 high stakes poker cash game featuring Shaun Deeb and friends with commentary from comedian Joe Stapleton - Season 10 Episode 11 filmed in Las Vegas, NV (November 2023). Lineup: Shaun Deeb, Ben Lamb, Keir Sullivan, MJ Gonzales, Shane Sigsbee, Craig Stackewicz, Clay Johnson. Commentary by Joe Stapleton.

programme.title: Poker Night In America
programme.desc: Can 9-time NHL All-Star Jeremy Roenick use his aggressive and competitive spirit to outwit a table full of poker sharks or will he be a fish out of water? Watch Jeremy at the Poker Night in America Studio 52 cash game with Jason Somerville, Scott Ball, Jeremiah Williams, Terrance Reid, Jesse Sylvia and Nick Marchington.

programme.title: Poker Night In America

programme.title: World Series of Poker

programme.title: World Series of Poker

programme.title: World Series of Poker
programme.desc: The biggest No-Limit Hold'em buy-in of the 2004 WSOP outside of the Main Event would attract 254 entrants and create a prize pool of $1,193,800. programme.title: We Caught That

programme.title: We Caught That
programme.desc: Capt. Jason Dozier and Janot take a break from the guided trips, and take themselves on a hunting adventure.

programme.title: We Caught That

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Shotgun sports are experiencing unprecedented growth, with competitions across the country gaining popularity as enthusiasts vie to be the best shooters in the world. Every summer, the Amateur Trapshooting Association hosts The Grand American in Sparta, Illinois. This year marks the 125th Anniversary for the largest trap shooting competition in the world. We’ll talk with the people who make this tournament run behind the scenes and explore what makes this tournament such a special event. We’ll also look at the rich history of The Grand. On-site we’ll chat with the curator of the Trapshooting Hall of Fame and look at some of the incredible historical pieces on display in the museum. Additionally, we’ll learn about White Flyer and how the clay manufacturer has made important innovations for the shotgun sports.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Join Mark Peterson on an epic hunting adventure in the stunning landscapes of New Zealand as he goes after Whitetail deer. On this hunt, Mark was unable to get his firearms import permit in time to take his Gunwerks rifle, so he'd have to borrow a trusty rifle from his guide, Shawn. Get ready for heart-pounding action, breathtaking scenery, and valuable tips and tricks from a seasoned hunter.

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.sub-title: "The Choice — Last Hour Iowa Whitetail Bruiser"
programme.desc: Ralph’s Iowa buck dreams come true, in a big way, in the last hour of his hunt.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: A Southwest Mississippi GIANT “Barry” has made more daylight appearances than possibly any mature bucks in existence. Now that Slade is back from the midwest The chase is on.
Get ready for one of the best seasons yet from Team200! From giant elk to monster bears and a couple 200″ whitetails, you don’t want to miss a single episode from Team200 this year!

programme.title: The Hunted Land & Sea
programme.desc: Gerry Holland heads to North Dakota to hunt pheasant with his father in law Joe Myers, their extended family and bird dogs.

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.desc: Kyle Barefield and Cole Barthel from All Things Hunting head to the Rocky Mountains with Browning Rifles in hand after “Wapiti” the Native American Term meaning “White Rump” referring to Elk.

programme.title: HuntStand Presents
programme.desc: Three friends finally pack their bags and head west for the annual HuntStand pronghorn hunting camp—each with a unique goal in mind.

programme.title: The Huntsman
programme.sub-title: "Sambar Hunting with Hounds & Pointers – High Country Adventure!"
programme.desc: Join Chris Waters (The Huntsman) and his mate Luke Dobson as they head deep into the rugged Victorian High Country for an adrenaline-fueled sambar hunt with pointers and hounds. This fast-paced, action-packed hunt puts their skills—and their dogs—to the test as they track, stalk, and close in on these elusive giants of the bush. - With the steep terrain, thick cover, and the raw power of the hounds driving the hunt, every moment is intense. Will they get the perfect shot? Or will the sambar give them the slip? Don’t miss this thrilling pursuit through one of Australia’s wildest landscapes!

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: From then to now. The Raven Farm has been an ongoing project and we want to catch you up from the very beginning to what it is now and what we have to look forward to the future. This farm is going to be a mecca for giant whitetails.

programme.title: Full Strut
programme.desc: Trent has narrowed down the area on his property where the turkeys usually roost, but this year it was a little different! A monster roost sets up in their normal trees and creates one action packed morning for Trent!

programme.title: Full Strut
programme.desc: "Clayton and Skyler always start their turkey season off in Kansas. With the early Archery season it makes for a great advantage if the birds are acting right. This year they are looking for redemption for a rough season the year prior and man did it come together perfectly! Tag along on this intense Archery Turkey Hunt! "

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "Louisiana's Wild Food & Award-Winning Cuisine | Hog Hunting, Swamp Fishing & MORE"
programme.desc: In Episode 2: New Orleans, Josh links up with Mason Hereford (owner of award-winning sandwich shop Turkey and the Wolf) and then hits the road for some epic hog hunting, swamp fishing, crawfish and oyster harvesting, and exploring Louisiana’s only water buffalo dairy farm. It all culminates in one incredible feast featuring unique regional dishes prepared by Mason with the help of some local friends.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "Can You Surf & Eat Like a Local in Minnesota? Wild Foraging & Delicious Local Eats"
programme.desc: In Episode 3, Josh starts off in the Twin Cities where he meets up with Yia Vang, an award-winning Hmong chef and restaurant owner, bringing his family’s traditions and flavors to the American Midwest. As Josh heads up north to Duluth and the boundary waters, he’ll meet plenty of farmers and foragers—harvesting mushrooms, wild rice, and catching a few fish (and waves) along the way. It all wraps up with an epic feast hosted by Yia back in the cities.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "Exploring New York City's Hidden Culinary Gems: Cooking Goat Brains, Lobster & MORE"
programme.desc: New. York. City. That’s where our host Josh Rosen kicks off his journey in Episode 4—and where he lived for 16 years and started up the surf-centric apparel brand, Saturdays NYC. Back in his old stomping grounds, Josh first meets up with the award-winning chef and Mumbai native, Chintan Pandya, currently blowing up the New York food scene with his unapologetic and authentic Indian cuisine (pro tip: try the goat brains). Next, Josh travels through the boroughs, heads upstate, and along the coast to source local ingredients—from sake brewers and pig farmers to catching fresh lobster just 100 miles from Wall Street. As always the adventure will end with a feast, right back in Chintan’s kitchen.

programme.title: TRP
programme.desc: Today we’re having a conversation with Zeb Hogan, the author, biologist, and television host known for his show "Monster Fish." In this episode, Hogan shares his experiences with the show, his upcoming book "Chasing Giants: In Search of the World's Largest Freshwater Fish," and his insights into the world of freshwater biology. programme.title: How the FIA Robbed Hamilton's 2008 Belgian GP Win
programme.desc: After an intense battle with Kimi Raikkonen, Lewis Hamilton put on an incredible performance to cross the finish line first at the 2008 Belgian Grand Prix. But he never won... In the latest of Autosport’s “Short View Back to the Past” series, Chief Editor Kevin Turner looks at when Hamilton was robbed at Spa.

programme.title: Top 10 Senna Moments
programme.desc: Qualifying performances from "another dimension"; thrashing his rivals repeatedly in torrential wet conditions; doing whatever it took to win the world championship at all costs. Ayrton Senna's too-brief time in Formula 1 was a colourful tapestry of brilliant driving and high-stakes controversy. On the 25th anniversary of his tragic crash at Imola, Autosport brings you the most unforgettable moments of the late Brazilian's F1 career.

programme.title: Giorgio Piola: Illustrating Speed
programme.desc: For nearly 50 years Giorgio Piola has been the foremost technical journalist in Formula 1. He has attended more Grands Prix than anyone in history. This film looks at the remarkable career of this legend.

programme.title: The Top 10 Red Bull F1 Drivers - Part 1
programme.desc: Red Bull is much younger than Formula 1’s other big teams, having arrived in 2005. But in less than two decades it has racked up some impressive achievements. Six drivers’ and five constructors’ titles headline a CV that includes 92 world championship grand prix wins, enough for sixth on the all-time list behind Ferrari, McLaren, Mercedes, Williams and Lotus. For this list of top 10 F1 drivers, we’ve taken into account the amount of success the racers scored with Red Bull and its sister team Toro Rosso/AlphaTauri, the impact they had and the circumstances of their time within the Red Bull fold. Want to know more about our top 10 or hear experts debate the list? Take a look here: Top 10 Red Bull F1 drivers: https://www.autosport.com/f1/news/top-10-red-bull-f1-drivers-ranked-vettel-verstappen-perez-and-more/7085857/ Podcast: https://www.autosport.com/f1/news/autosport-podcast-top-10-red-bull-f1-drivers-ranked/8924571/

programme.title: The Top 10 Red Bull F1 Drivers - Part 2
programme.desc: Red Bull is much younger than Formula 1’s other big teams, having arrived in 2005. But in less than two decades it has racked up some impressive achievements. programme.title: Round 1: Donington Park
programme.desc: Watch the first round of the 2025 British GT Championship at Donington Park.

programme.title: Michael Schumacher at Le Mans
programme.desc: In 1991, before his stellar F1 career, Michael Schumacher raced for Mercedes at Le Mans - and had a legitimate shot at winning the most prestigious endurance race in the World. Autosport Editor-in-Chief Kevin Turner narrates the story of this dramatic race, and explains how the lessons Schumacher learnt in these 900bhp cars shaped his career in F1, and assisted him in some of his most famous races.

programme.title: Carbon Fibre vs Liveries - What F1 Needs to Bring Colour Back
programme.desc: F1's 2024 season may have kicked off, but during the pre-season events, bare carbon fibre kept catching our eyes. It was an interesting novelty a few years ago, but in 2024, fans are missing the bright, colourful paint schemes of previous years. To understand more, Jon Noble chatted with Mark Turner, Co-Founder and CEO of Silverstone Paint Technology, who works with the majority of the F1 grid, to find out more.

programme.title: Are Mercedes Back on Form? - F1 Analysis
programme.desc: After a dry spell of 938 days, Mercedes finally returning to winning ways with George Russell taking victory at the 2025 Canadian Grand Prix. But was it just a flash in the pan, or the first sign that Brackley is on the way back to their dominant past? In the video, we analyse Mercedes victory, the tyre management woes that have ailed them in recent year and the upgrades they've brought to combat it, and the future of the team with both George Russell and Kimi Antonelli both out of contract at the end of the current season.

programme.title: 'Feels like yesterday' - Álex Crivillé looks back on his legendary career
programme.desc: MotoGP Hall of Famer and 500cc 1999 World Champion Álex Crivillé talks to us about his incredible career and what his predictions are for the current stars of MotoGP. From his biggest rivals, to bike evolutions and his current favourite equestrian hobbies. Criville tells us all about it here at Motorsport.

programme.title: Can Gresini's Alex Marquez be a MotoGP World Champion? - From Team Manager Michele Masini
programme.desc: In an exclusive interview, Motorsport sits down with MotoGP's Michele Masini, the Team Manager of Gresini Racing. In a candid chat, Masini talks about the experience gained by working with Gresini over the years, how Nadia Padovani is continuing her late husband Fausto Gresini's legacy and what it's like having a Ducati battle between the Marquez brothers at the top of the MotoGP grid.

programme.title: F1's Fiercest Rivalries with Karun Chandhok
programme.desc: From the personal insults of Nigel Mansell vs Nelson Piquet, the short but fiery feud between Ayrton Senna and Michael Schumacher, to a friendship turned sour between Nico Rosberg and Lewis Hamilton, they’re all featured here. But what pair takes the Number 1 spot? Autosport Editor-In-Chief Kevin Turner sits down with former driver and Sky Sports F1 broadcaster Karun Chandhok to debate who they think are the Top 10 greatest rivalries in the sport’s 75-year history. Let us know who you think F1’s greatest rivalry was in the comments, and check back soon for a new series of F1 Top 10 Podcasts!

programme.title: The Great Siberian Traverse
programme.desc: The Great Siberian Traverse documents a 6,000-mile ski journey through Russia, along the Trans-Siberian Railway. The documentary, created by Sherpas Cinema in collaboration with Powder Magazine and The North Face, showcases a fringe backcountry skiing community, deep Siberian powder, and skiing�s ancient origins. Team skiers Ingrid Backstrom, Callum Pettit, and Nick Martini share their insights along the adventure.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One competitor’s weapon proves fatal for their opposition, crushing their hopes of a title with a single blow, whilst other unlucky robots are removed from not only the arena, but also the competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The Grand Final is here as the series draws to an explosive end. With every battle being so well matched, the judges have their work cut out for them as they decide which robot, will become Robot Wars: The Seventh Wars champions.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.sub-title: The Seventh Wars - Third World Championship
programme.desc: Twelve Robots from across the globe once again gather in the arena for the Third World Championship. Eliminator style rounds will decide which robots progress through to the finals, where a winner will be crowned.

programme.title: MechMania
programme.desc: Robot fightings newest competition begins! In the first heat, meet new robots and some familiar faces as teams get a feel for the arena and size up their competition. Filmed in Grantham in front of a live audience, robots battle for survival in the Robots Live Arena.

programme.title: MechMania
programme.desc: Heat 2 of the UKs most brutal robot combat competition takes the action to Crawley in the south of England. Winners and losers from Heat 1 face fresh opponents, fighting to secure a win and guarantee their place in the finals.

programme.title: MechMania
programme.desc: Its the last chance for teams to secure a spot before the final. In savage and tactical 1v1 matches, teams battle for a place in the top 16. New robots join the fray, hoping for a last-minute victory to advance to the championship.

programme.title: MechMania
programme.desc: The most battle-hardened combat robots in the UK compete in the MechMania Grand Final. After three grueling heats, only the toughest survive. The tournament is now a single-elimination, 1v1, sudden-death formatuntil one team emerges as the victorious champion.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Robot Wars returns. The House Robots have been upgraded and are ready to dismantle any of the 40 competing teams brave enough to enter the hazardous arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A Consultant Cardiologist and his two sons try their luck with a brand new, untested machine. Judge Sethu Vijayakumar discusses his work with Nasa in creating androids for the Mission to Mars.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: This show features an eclectic collection of home-made robots, one designed by a nine year old and another constructed out of wood. Some competitors from the Classic series return to the arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: In this show we see the former Holiday camp Bluecoats daring to flip two of the House Robots with their ‘launcher’ Apollo. The most expensive Robot in the Series competes in this Heat.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: This features one of the most bizarre but certainly the tallest robot ever seen on Robot Wars, Gabriel, built my Mensa member Craig and his three sons.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: In this show the heat winners in shows 1 to 5 come back to fight again. The judges must choose one Wild Card from the runners up to join them.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The first heat of the second Revival Series begins. Robots return from previous series to take on the daring newcomers and each other. Competitors get bullied and thrown around the ring as they desperately try to scrape a place in the finals.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A tentative start to the second heat ends in carnage as the house robots and competitors go all out to qualify. Shunt delivers the final blow for one contestant.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The third heat shows devastating weapons put into action, being on the receiving end of these could mean elimination for an unlucky competitor. The house robots take on cleaning duties as they remove immobilised robots from the arena floor.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One competitor draws first blood only seconds into the first round. After suffering severe damage at the hands of another competitor, one robots chance at the finals may be lost.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The last chance for combatants to fight for a place in the Grand Final. With the newcomers outnumbering the veterans, will the first timers make up for their lack of experience?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: This episode, a new Robot Wars champion will emerge! Sparks and scraps are sure to fly in this explosive series finale. Winners will have to make it through the four-way melees and head-to-head battles to be able to prove themselves in the final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Learn more about this infamous Robot and the family that built it. With an unforgettable design and devastating weapon, this competitor became an instant icon.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Debuting in the Second Wars, to becoming the most successful Robot ever to take part in Robot Wars. This Robot put the squeeze on all the competition, including the House Robots.

programme.title: MechMania
programme.desc: Robot fightings newest competition begins! In the first heat, meet new robots and some familiar faces as teams get a feel for the arena and size up their competition. Filmed in Grantham in front of a live audience, robots battle for survival in the Robots Live Arena.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George's exploration of the undersea world begins on a submarine in Grand Caymon.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George returns to the “Fin Del Mundo” at the southern tip of Argentina, this time to sail on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving the stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps out in the Antarctic snow, and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off the melting glaciers.

programme.title: Viral Wild
programme.desc: Those that thrive beneath the waves teach us to go with the flow.

programme.title: Viral Wild
programme.desc: From oceans to rivers to kiddie pools, aquatic life finds a way.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: The North Atlantic Ocean is generous with her bounty, until she takes a life in return. Mark braves the deep seas on the most dangerous day of the lobster fishing season.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Costa Rica is a tiny country jammed with diversity and adventure. George explores the volcanoes of Costa Rica with an international team of scientists, rafts down whitewater rivers in full flood, canyoneers down raging waterfalls, and handles some of deadliest snakes this tropical country has to offer.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George and three side-kicks head straight into the “Bearcage”, looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones that Texas and Oklahoma can throw at them. They find it – and their stormchasing vehicles don’t look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore the frigid Canadian arctic in the depths of winter. The team first uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head north through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: No-one creates eco-disasters on quite the scale of the former Soviet Union. In Uzbekistan, the Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, has seen its waters diverted, so that it has shrunk to 1/6 its previous size. In Crimea, a mountain has been carved into a james bondian submarine base. In northern Ukraine, the Chernobyl nuclear site has been reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: We break the bounds of earth, and look at the environment of space. We examine the difficulties and challenges of exploring this most challenging environment.↵ ↵George experiences some of the extreme training needed for space travel –aboard a Czech-built Albatross fighter jet, the Zero-G plane, and a centrifuge producing 6 G’s of force, and witnesses the launch of a flight to the International Space Station.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Filming the volcanoes, mudpools and geysers in the geothermic wonderland of New Zealand’s north island, we learn that a new island is being created by an undersea volcano 1000 miles north in Tonga. Determined to be among the first to see this “newest land on earth”, we head for the remote island by plane and boat, after various nautical mishaps, George ends up, bedraggled and clad in nothing but underwear and a lifejacket, honored to be one of the very first to explore this brand new island.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George's exploration of the undersea world begins on a submarine in Grand Caymon.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George returns to the “Fin Del Mundo” at the southern tip of Argentina, this time to sail on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving the stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps out in the Antarctic snow, and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off the melting glaciers.

programme.title: Mission: Hurricane
programme.desc: Josh Morgerman chased 3 typhoons in 6 days, a personal record amidst the Western Pacific's destructive forces.

programme.title: Mission: Hurricane
programme.sub-title: Mission: Hurricane | Top 10 Most Dangerous Chases

programme.title: American Beats

programme.title: American Beats

programme.title: Beach Battles

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samanta Brown Places to Love: Cali Road Trip
programme.desc: There’s nowhere quite like California for an epic road trip. With its constantly changing landscapes, you feel like you’re somewhere completely new in just an hour or two. In this episode, Samantha kicks off her trip in vibrant, beachy San Diego and finishes in the rustic forests surrounding Big Bear Lake. Join her as she explores small towns, unique landmarks, and incredible businesses to see what makes California a Place to Love.

programme.title: Roadfood Adventures USA
programme.desc: Travel the South to find the most colorful roads in the nation and discover delicious food, magnificent scenery, magic moments, and fascinating people all along the way.

programme.title: Into America's Wild
programme.desc: Step off the beaten path and connect to your inner trailblazer in this cross-country journey to some of the most beautiful but little-known landscapes of North America. Into America’s Wild is a non-stop ride via kayak, train, bike, hot air balloon and more that explores the transformational allure of wild places and the human connection we all share with the natural world.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric treks the canyons and waters of Lake Powell, Utah on foot and via packraft.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric leaves the backcountry to discover urban hiking adventures in the cities of Los Angeles and San Francisco, California.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 1
programme.desc: Canadians Sophie and Anna go on a journey of discovery, luck and love in the Cradle of Liberty, Boston, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 2
programme.desc: Gabby and Jono try their luck in panoramic Salt Lake City, Utah.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 3
programme.desc: Percy and Michelle go on a game of chance in the Emerald city of Seattle.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Browns Places To Love: Sonoma, CA
programme.desc: I’m in a destination that is easily considered to be one of the most beautiful in the world. A place of immense natural beauty that helps create a renewed connection to nature. Here’s why Sonoma County is a place to love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Browns Places To Love: Madison, WI
programme.desc: There’s nothing quite like a destination that knows how to embrace the cold. Samantha loves winter, and she's always looking for places that love it just as much. Join her as she explores the many reasons why Madison, Wisconsin is a Place to Love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Brown Places to Love: Big Sky, MT
programme.desc: Welcome to Big Sky, Montana! This is a destination that sees 400 inches of powder on average and is home to nearly 6,000 skiable acres. No matter the season or how low the temperatures drops, there’s always something inspiring to find if you’re curious enough to look. From embracing the snowy outdoors to enjoying the local businesses of a tight knit community, join Samantha as she explores what makes Big Sky a Place to Love.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy dives into a serious beef bonanza with scratch-made meaty ravioli in Delaware, an elevated spin on the French dip in San Diego and beefed-up Middle-Eastern fare in El Paso, Texas.

programme.title: The Main Event
programme.desc: Join hosts Amon Focus and J. Damany Daniel as they dive into the heart of America’s oldest Mardi Gras celebration in Mobile, Alabama.

programme.title: Amplify
programme.desc: Singer/songwriter Summer Dean visits her college stomping grounds and discovers it offers more music history than Buddy Holly. Punk rock drummer Phanie Diaz checks out local art in San Antonio and rapper Lou Charles.

programme.title: Beach Battles
programme.desc: Dive into the fun blowing conchs in Key West, Florida and race pro SUPS in Wrightsville Beach, North Carolina.

programme.title: Sorted Food: Game Changers
programme.desc: Sorted hits up the Iowa State Fair and attempts to complete an insane foodie challenge.

programme.title: National Parks Top Ten
programme.desc: Hidden gems at America's most beautiful locations are highlighted, from jaw-dropping views at Redwood National Park to gourmet grub at a gas station in Yosemite.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Browns Places To Love: Chattanooga
programme.desc: Located along the Tennessee River at the foothills of the Appalachian Mountains, Chattanooga, Tennessee, is the perfect blend of city and country. Over the last century, it has constantly found ways to reinvent and revitalize itself while still respecting its natural surroundings. Whether you’re wandering along its riverwalk, visiting one of its award-winning museums, finding unique ways to take in the views, or indulging in its generous culinary scene, join Samantha as she explores what makes Chattanooga a Place to Love.

programme.title: Diners Drive Ins and Dives
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hittin' the road and chowin' down on some long-standing traditions.

programme.title: Amplify
programme.desc: Phanie gets a lesson in the bajo sexto, a 12-stringed guitar, while Lou meets the owner of Houston’s independent record shop Vinal Edge. Summer tries her hand at graffiti art.

programme.title: Amplify
programme.desc: Summer jams with Nathen Rogers and his band, La Croix Boix. Lou gets a tour of Sugarhill Recording Studio and Phanie’s punk band plays alongside the accordion-powered Tex Mex band Piñata Protest.

programme.title: Venturing Out: St. Croix
programme.desc: Adventurer and filmmaker Creighton is joined by co-host and local Olivia who challenges him to step out of his comfort zones in surprising ways.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Brown Places to Love: Brooklyn
programme.desc: When you think New York City, you probably envision Manhattan. Yet a lot of the city’s heart and soul resides in Brooklyn. As one of the five boroughs in the USA’s largest city, Brooklyn is actually quite huge. But don’t let the size alarm you—this borough has a low-key, neighborhood vibe that’s devoid of the Manhattan hustle. Add in diverse neighborhoods, great food and unexpected businesses, and Brooklyn is a place to love.

programme.title: Something in the Water

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: In the middle of rural Maine, Paul and Nick create an outside barbeque for the family of John Mann, an eighth generation Ulster-Scot immigrant. The Manns are true frontier-people, and completely self sufficient from their land.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Chefs Paul Rankin and Nick Nairn are in Lexington, Virginia to cook for descendants of the Ulster-Scots Lewis family who settled in the area in the 18th century. Along the way they visit a heritage pig farmer, taste some sparkling cider and they discover some delicious goat’s cheese in the heart of Virginia’s Piedmont region where Paul has a close encounter with a friendly goat…

programme.title: Not Another Black Movie
programme.desc: Not Another Black Movie stars Damon Williams (Bad Boys of Comedy, Comic View, BET LIVE, The Tom Joyner Morning Show), Janet Hubert (The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air), Rodney Perry (The Monique Show, Who's Got Jokes) Jay Davis (Not Another Zombie Movie, Shots Fired), and Leon Rogers (WGCI, Comic View, Bad Boys of Comedy). - Not Another Black Movie is not only a spoof of a genre often associated with Tyler Perry films, but a satirical look at family dysfunction as well. Written by Jay Davis and Directed by Donte "Diesel" Williams, Not Another Black Movie addresses issues that effect many families whether they be rich or poor, black or white. Although we poke fun at some of the stereotypical roles portrayed in this genre, we hope to shed some light on problems that plague many families while giving you a good laugh.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The Players awake with no memories and must quickly work together to navigate a dangerous dungeon. The extra twist? They have no idea they are playing their actual characters!

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The party has passed the trial! With acceptance into the city of Anwar, their new goal is recovering those stolen memories...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Tragedy has struck the party, a member has fallen. Adding to their strife, they now find themselves in yet another tough situation below Anwar.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Hurtling down the water passageway on the journey to The Dark, the party's boat takes a beating. Luckily for them, this means their captor The Lovely Lute takes a beating as well. Now they must try to continue their mission for the Crystal Rod.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.sub-title: The Short Adventures of Thistle & Arky
programme.desc: Who better to go poking around in goblin tunnels than the only members of the party who will fit inside?! But what Arky and Thistle find in the warrens is not what they expected…

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The party finds the dwarven city of Iron Stone. Unfortunately, it is under siege by strange magical creatures. And what has become of that dangerous assassin, the Lovely Lute?

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Coming upon the lava-fueled dwarven forge, the party begins to craft anti-magical emerald-imbued weapons. That is, until the whole building begins to shake...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Iron Stone is saved! As thanks, the party receives a bounty of magical crystals and a powerful new iron suit for Arky. Now they head for Rock Bottom, a duegar dwarf city beneath a waterfall in the dark Underground.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Reaching Pelion Darrus, the Party finds it under devastating attack from above and below. One hero makes an unexpected journey, dragging the party into a surprising decision in this weeks episode!

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The Audio Dungeon crew begin their adventure in the world of Andaria. Finndelar (Tom) the wizard, and Hogar (Dan) the ranger, have just finished their two month journey, and have reached their destination; The Sunken City. Finn's mission is to retrieve a magical device created in part by a local craftsman: Arkie Fint. Hogar, an ally of Finn, was hired to guide and protect him. When they arrive, they find themselves in the midst of a large celebration, as well as a mystery regarding their mission...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Finndelar (Tom) and Hogar (Dan) have arrived in the Sunken City and are now searching for the magical device they have journeyed so far for. After meeting the craftsman Arkie Fint, they travel to Smithy's tavern in hope of finding a clue to their mystery...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Smithy's party has proven to be entertaining and everyone is enjoying themselves. Meanwhile, during the festivities, Bludgy, the city's most notorious thief is seen sneaking upstairs, drawing the attention of others. Finn and Hogar's mission hangs in the balance...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Finn and Hogar are tied up below Smithy's tavern along with a few others. Bludgy is about to sell off the crystal rod for a life changing amount ofgold, while Arkie is "retrieving" something important from his workshop.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The party, now in possession of the CRYSTAL ROD, has fled from the thieves in the Sunken City through the underground tunnels. Once outside, they discover the Queen's forces are invading from the sea, bombarding the city. They quickly slip out beyond the walls, north of the city... but to go where?

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The party has been caught trying to escape and with them, the Artifact. Eventually they wake up shackled to a cart, and surrounded by guards on their way back into the occupied Sunken City… at the mercy of the Queen's Forces.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: "The party has adjusted to their new lives the best ways they know, how but they are eager to escape. - - Follow the party as they continue working their 9 to 5 jobs with only one lunch break and four 15 minute coffee breaks fun by the evil Queen’s forces."

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: "The Party is in action, and so is the party. Our would be heroes are posing as entertainment to get aboard the rooks ship and steal back the rod before they can escape. - - Will they succeed?"

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: "Our Party, aka Blackwater Bandits, have earned their name stealing back the rod from the Rook. Now its time for one more performance... the disappearing act. - - Will they succeed in this mid-season finale?"

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The Players awake with no memories and must quickly work together to navigate a dangerous dungeon. The extra twist? They have no idea they are playing their actual characters!

programme.desc: Isamu is competing in a ping pong tournament when Baseball Zombie stages a hostile takeover, barging in and stealing the ping pong ball! To save the tournament, Zo Zo sets off in hot pursuit to retrieve the lost ball!

programme.title: Zo Zo Zombie
programme.desc: Zo Zo runs into the town mayor, literally, and is thrilled when his honor offers to build a new skate park! First though, the mayor wants a new haircut and so Zo Zo takes him to Barbershop Zombie.

programme.title: Zo Zo Zombie

programme.title: Zo Zo Zombie
programme.desc: Isamu and Zo Zo Zombie make a new friend: the airy Bellow the Cloud. When the young nimbus shows them his ability to change shapes, and to transform water into rain or snow, Isamu gets the bright idea to feed him donuts.

programme.title: Cyboars

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner… his mom!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Minecraft, Roblox and More with Amy Lee
programme.desc: Hey Guys! I am Amy Lee! Welcome to my Channel! Check it out for videos on Minecraft, Roblox, The Sims plus oth

programme.title: Argo's World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator’s text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here.

programme.title: Magic Lantern
programme.desc: Animation series “Magic Lantern” tells little viewers wonderful adventure stories, based on classic literature plots. Little video games fan Mike and his smart sister Kate watch and discuss each story presented as a strip film. Funny stories will help seeing classic stories from the new side and prove that world classic literature is exciting and interesting.

programme.title: Woodventures
programme.desc: "Woodventures" is an animated series for preschool children. The main characters are wooden toys: Kitty Meow, Doggy Woof-Woof, Piggy Oink, Horsey Yee-Ho-Ho and Elephant Pawoo. The toys live in a small wooden town (the prototype of a child's play room). Every toy has its own unique personality and reacts to different circumstances appropriately. With the help of the invisible narrator, the toys, along with the audience solve different tasks, play and take part in adventures. "Woodventures" is a musical series with lots of songs and dances. Some of the songs represent our characters and appear in each series, and some of the songs are related to the events in the series, so it is only found in that particular episode.Each episode presents a playful and learning environment. Toys, along with the audience, learn about colors, shapes, objects, come out of difficult situations, learn about friendship and the world in general. The series is simple, kind and funny.

programme.title: Cutie Cubies
programme.desc: An animation series about the adventures of four aliens - Cubies: Captain, Boatswain, Navigator, and Doctor. Having arrived on our planet and disguised as representatives of the local flora and fauna of the cubic form: a yellow chicken, a red rabbit, a blue aquarium and a bush of green grass, they are learning the diverse phenomena of our planet Earth.

programme.title: What If: Chase Dies in Space
programme.sub-title: What If You Fell Into Jupiter?

programme.sub-title: What If You Spent a Nanosecond in a Black Hole?
programme.desc: What would the outcome be if you took a leap of faith straight into a black hole? Today, I’m taking you on a journey into the heart of darkness—just one nanosecond inside a black hole.

programme.desc: Today I'm going to make a dive into the darkest depths of Neptune, all the way to its core. I'm going to show you some crazy violent winds and you'll see why Neptune can make you real rich.

programme.desc: This is Io. One of the four largest moons of Jupiter. A terrifying, inhospitable world, it's got huge lakes of molten lava bigger than an average city. Will Chase survive there?

programme.title: What If: Technology

programme.desc: After Antarctica follows polar explorer Will Steger’s journey as an eyewitness to the greatest changes to the polar regions of our planet.

programme.title: And Two If By Sea
programme.desc: The story of iconic professional surfers and identical twins CJ & Damien Hobgood. Their sibling rivalry and struggle to each establish their own identity fueled their careers, but ripped their personal and peripheral relationships apart.

programme.title: 7 Miles of Paradise
programme.desc: The North Shore is a 7 Mile stretch of paradise like no other on Earth. Every year thousands of people flock to the North Shore of Oahu to see the world's best surfers ride arguably the world's best waves. Pro surfers have created their careers, made their livings and even become legends from surfing these shores. Pro surfer Anastasia Ashley will be your tour guide and take you to the places she loves, the places she went as a kid growing up there, and introduce you to the people that always made it feel like home. We will experience and understand why she loves the North Shore, and considers it '7 Miles of Paradise'

programme.title: Caveheart
programme.desc: Mason Ho takes his faithful companion far from their home in Hawaii and into foreign frigid waters in search for medieval liquid caves.

programme.title: Cluster
programme.desc: This is our bookmark. Our full stop. It is an actual document of individuality and modern surfing and living and romping and laughing. Collect it and recollect on it. Here we are now, entertain us. And well take it from there.

programme.title: Lost Atlas
programme.desc: Featuring the original six from Mod Coll and introducing surfing's newest guns. With its emphasis on performance and struck to a soundtrack that veers across all genres, Lost Atlas is the must-see surf film of 2011.

programme.title: Dear Suburbia
programme.desc: An interpretation of our lifestyle, culture, riding waves, and traveling the world.

programme.title: Big Wave Tow-In Invitational
programme.desc: Five of the world's most prolific big wave riders charge 30-foot waves at the center of the big wave universe.

programme.title: Ground Swell: Epic Stories of Monster Waves
programme.desc: Showcasing the most famous big wave spots on the planet and the surfers who tackled them.

programme.title: Ground Swell: Other Side of Fear
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the 2021-22 big wave season through the eyes of legendary surfers.

programme.title: Surfing Morning of the Sun
programme.desc: Stunning contemporary surfing mixed with classic surfing from the 1970's. A inspirational homage to the classic surf films of the 1970's like Morning of the Earth. This is one the finest of its genre and noted for the original score.

programme.title: Not By Chance
programme.desc: Trevor Gordon builds a surfboard in 2 days, sails the Atlantic, and rides waves with it.

programme.title: Surprise Excitement Party
programme.desc: Transworld Surf presents Surprise Excitement Party. Starring Mark Healey, John Florence, Conner Coffin, Parker Coffin, Michel Bourez and many more.

programme.title: Ind Ho Nesia
programme.desc: IND HO NESIA is a taste of our 2024 journey. Mostly surfing, trying to find fun waves, and bumping into go

programme.title: Beyond Normal
programme.desc: In this intimate portrayal of resilience and self-discovery, professional surfer Becca Speak battles to reclaim her identity and return to the waves after a devastating brain injury suffered during a competition.

programme.title: To Be Frank
programme.desc: To Be Frank explores authenticity and community in surfing via Frank Paine, a 73-year-old South Bay icon.

programme.title: Let's Surf Seriously
programme.desc: Surf like you mean it--grab surfing by the balls and twist them like a crocodile dragging a baby goat to its death! If you're gonna surf, do it for real, it's time. Let's surf seriously!

programme.title: Unsurfed Afghanistan
programme.desc: Unsurfed Afghanistan follows Afridun's journey to find waves in his homeland, across three continents.

programme.title: Noah: The Art of Surfing
programme.desc: Professional surfer Noah Beschen travels to Western Australia and Tahiti alongside filmmaker Andy Woodward to surf beautiful yet powerful waves before returning home to the North Shore of Oahu.

programme.title: The Essence of Surfing
programme.desc: The Essence of Surfing is a riveting surf documentary that gets to the heart of why surfing is the greatest sport in the world. Featuring surfers of all kinds, from the neighborhood grom to some of the greatest surfers to ever live, The Essence of Surfing uncovers what it is about this awesome sport that makes it a necessary part of each of their lives. Shot in the world's most beautiful locations by top notch Cinematographers Erik Ippel and Mike Prickett, this film is sure to hook and inspire anyone looking to get wet and catch some waves.

programme.title: Blissful Surfing
programme.desc: Blissful Surfing has awesome action sequences with great surfers in perfect waves. The surfing by John John Florence, Italo and Bobby Martinez is fantastic. The Blissful Surfing vibe is one of supreme happiness and contentment.

programme.title: Stranger Surfing
programme.desc: Stranger Surfing opens with a huge air flip by Gabriel Medina and the action just gets hotter and hotter. John John launches and pulls a 6 foot rotation air.

programme.title: Girl on Wave
programme.desc: Girl on Wave follows windsurfer Sarah Hauser and documents her journey as a New-Caledonian athlete competing on the American stage of windsurfing. Performing in competitions around the globe, Sarah is leaving a unique mark on the sport.

programme.title: Knitting Stitch Along: Shadow Mosaic #9
programme.desc: Betty goes over Barbara Walker's Shadow Mosaic #9 in this Stitch Along.

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Color
programme.desc: This episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell is our ode to color — intermediate stitch techniques, a look at different types of dyed fibers, and a project that shows off beautifully water-colored yarn!

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Global
programme.desc: On this episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we celebrate our global community by focusing on yarns, techniques, and designers from around the world.

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Multicraftual
programme.desc: It’s rare that a maker has love for only one method, so on this episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we experiment with multi-craftuality — mixing materials, and combining knitting and crochet with sewing, weaving, and more!

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Amigurumi
programme.desc: On this episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we’re all about the super, happy, fun time cuteness of Amigurumi — crochet and knit toys. Learn how to crochet an adorable Loaf Kitty and sweet Sloth, plus tips for toy knitting success!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: One Armed Tee
programme.desc: Learn how to make a one armed tee with Angela!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Tank Top Lace Trim
programme.desc: Learn how to make a comfortable tank top with Angela!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Turn a Sports Bra to a Tank Top
programme.desc: Lean how to turn your sports bra to a tank top!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Adding Pockets to Joggers
programme.desc: Learn how to add comfortable pockets to your joggers.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Skirt with Pockets
programme.desc: Learn how to make a beautiful skirt with pockets!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Leisure Sports Top
programme.desc: In the next step of her leisure outfit, Angela tackles how to make a perfect criss-cross strap.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Redesigning Fashions
programme.desc: Learn how to re-design a jacket!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Leggings
programme.desc: Learn to make a pair of comfortable and functional leggings.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Tank Top to Back Wrap
programme.desc: Angela Wolf takes a tank top and transforms it into a back wrap.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Bella Knit Top
programme.desc: Angela starts her two part tutorial on how to make a bella knit top: starting with the embroidery!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Embroidered Tank Tee
programme.desc: Learn how to make a tank top without even using a pattern!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Jacket Facing
programme.desc: Learn how to sew jacket facing!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Jacket Sleeves
programme.desc: Angela gives advice on how to make jacket sleeves.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Jeans & Pants That Fit
programme.desc: Want a better fit on your favorite pair of pants? Check out this video to learn how!

programme.title: Invisible Museum Tours: Vincent van Gogh - The Irises
programme.desc: Tour beautiful artworks and learn about artists throughout history in this special series brought to you by Zhenya Gershman.

programme.title: The Last Beekeeper
programme.desc: Other documentaries have done a fantastic job explaining in great detail the scientific nature of CCD. What the Last Beekeeper seeks to do is humanize the bees and tie them to very human stories. CCD is an environmental crisis, but until it hits home on a personal level, there will be no hope for change. After all, the plight of man and the plight of bees have been linked for centuries and at no time in history has that relationship been more strained.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Flattening Workbenches and Wide Boards with a Router
programme.desc: The traditional method for flattening a workbench is to use hand planes and winding sticks. While some folks truly relish this labor of love, others prefer to delegate this grunt work to power tools. The power tool method is very similar to the action of a CNC machine. The router sled is very easy to make from scrap 3/4 inch plywood. The rails can be made from 2 by 6 construction-grade lumber.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Festool CMS Router Table
programme.desc: Festool's new CMS Router Table hits the market in October 2012. Here's a first look at some of the main features and add-ons!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Grizzly Track Saw Review
programme.desc: I really don't have much spare time in my schedule right now but I decided to fast-track (haha, get it? track?) this review so that you can hopefully make a more informed purchase decision if you happen to be interested in this unit.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Greene & Greene Blacker House Chair
programme.desc: The Blacker House was one of the Greene & Greene Ultimate Bungalows built back in 1907. One of the most adored pieces to come out of the Blacker House is the living room chair. Since this project was on my personal bucket list, I took the opportunity to attend the class this past February and this video is the result of that effort.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Greene and Greene Inspired Entry Bench w/ Storage
programme.desc: This is an entry bench that makes a strong statement. Made from mahogany in the Greene & Greene style, this entry bench with storage is sturdy enough to sit on and features ample storage for blankets, shoes, coats, or whatever stuff you might want to shove in there.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Grasshopper Pull Toy
programme.desc: This fun little pull toy is easy to make. The great thing about it is you can get your child involved in the process at whatever level you're comfortable with. Older kids can cut and sand the parts. Younger kids can paint and assemble the grasshoppers.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Glue Caddy
programme.desc: Who wants to keep their glue on a shelf like some kind of medieval peasant? Instead, display your glue in style with a functional and beautiful glue caddy! Honestly, you never know when you're going to be invited to a glue party so having several bottles of glue, glue brushes, and a little water cup onboard means you're ready to glue at a moment's notice.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Get Back Dining Table
programme.desc: The smartest, most durable, fun & useful space-saving table, built using white oak and the Swing-Out Seat Table Hardware Kit from Get Back Inc.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Gaming Dining Table
programme.desc: Nicole and I are big gamers, be they video, dice, cards or classic board games. So when I was tasked with building a new dining table I knew I wanted it to be multi-purpose, serving our needs for meals as well as gaming. And so was born the Gaming Dining Table.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Gaming Coffee Table
programme.desc: A coffee table to doubles as a gaming surface!

programme.title: Knitting Stitch Along: Shadow Mosaic #9
programme.desc: Betty goes over Barbara Walker's Shadow Mosaic #9 in this Stitch Along.

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Color
programme.desc: This episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell is our ode to color — intermediate stitch techniques, a look at different types of dyed fibers, and a project that shows off beautifully water-colored yarn!

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Global
programme.desc: On this episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we celebrate our global community by focusing on yarns, techniques, and designers from around the world.

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Multicraftual
programme.desc: It’s rare that a maker has love for only one method, so on this episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we experiment with multi-craftuality — mixing materials, and combining knitting and crochet with sewing, weaving, and more!

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Amigurumi
programme.desc: On this episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we’re all about the super, happy, fun time cuteness of Amigurumi — crochet and knit toys. Learn how to crochet an adorable Loaf Kitty and sweet Sloth, plus tips for toy knitting success!

programme.title: The Stitchery: Coffee. Macrame. Dyeing. Tangents.
programme.desc: Trying to macrame a coffee cup and then dying it with real coffee

programme.title: The Stitchery: Recreating Centuries Old Embroidery
programme.desc: A dive into Jacobean crewel to add embroidery to a handmade skirt

programme.title: The Stitchery: I'm Remaking My EPIC Beauty and the Beast Embroidery... but Bigger! [Part 1]
programme.desc: A walk through the beginning steps of a huge embroidery

programme.title: The Stitchery: This Rug is LACE
programme.desc: Armenian needle lace done with chunky yarn to create a full area rug

programme.title: The Stitchery: Hot Air Balloon Macrame
programme.desc: Charlie attempts to make a hot air balloon macrame wall hanging.

programme.title: The Stitchery: Making a Macrame Chandelier in One Day (Almost)
programme.desc: My first attempt at making my own lamp

programme.title: Pure Design: Lee & Stevie's Living/Dining Room
programme.desc: Creating a living space that works for both kids and adults shouldn't mean you have to compromise on grown-up style. By using natural fibers and turning tired items into fabulous new centerpieces, Samantha Pynn transforms a living/dining room from a playroom into a glamorous living space that's sophisticated enough for a busy working mom yet playful enough for her young daughter.

programme.title: Pure Design: Helen & Niall's Nursery
programme.desc: Homeowners Helen and Niall are getting nervous - they're a few short months away from the birth of their first child and their never-renovated 1920s home doesn't contain a nursery. Both work full time - so they're relying on designer Samantha Pynn to create a bright and practical room for their new bundle of joy.

programme.title: Pure Design: Alexis & Adam's Kitchen
programme.desc: Alexis and Adam are in lifestyle shock: the arrival their son Hudson has meant that this formerly 'out and about' couple is now decidedly housebound but their 1980s kitchen just isn't happening anymore. It's neither practical nor beautiful so designer Samantha Pynn gives it an eco-friendly and stylish makeover. By taking out the dated metallic back-splash, lacquering their cabinets and updating the furnishings, Samantha converts an open kitchen and living area into a stunning space that is both functional for everyday use and glamorous enough for entertaining.

programme.title: Pure Design: Liliana and Frank's Living/Dining Room
programme.desc: Frank and Liliana's 1930s home gets fast-forwarded to the 21st century as designer Samantha Pynn uses environmentally friendly furniture and fresh accessories to update the look of classic English Revival.

programme.title: Pure Design: Ania & Walter's Master Bedroom
programme.desc: Too much space is not always a good thing, but with a little planning, designer Samantha Pynn is able to transform Ania and Walter's vast bedroom into a luxurious, earth-friendly boudoir.

programme.title: Pure Design: Lindsay's Teenage Bedroom
programme.desc: Designer Samantha Pynn creates an eco-fabulous bedroom for 16-year-old Lindsay that perfectly balances youthful without looking childish - and still allows for room to grow.

programme.title: Pure Design: Carolyn & Derek's Attic Loft
programme.desc: Designer Samantha Pynn transforms an unimaginative third floor loft into a fun, colorful, bohemian-inspired family room that matches homeowners Carolyn and Derek's personalities.

programme.title: She's Crafty: Eco Weddings
programme.desc: Knitting a laptop bag; reinventing ways to reuse an old shirt.

Infusing the policier genre with West African cinematic traditions and a neorealist emphasis on everyday life, the film becomes the story of one man's journey to find his purpose in the context of post-colonial Ghanaian independence.

programme.desc: Welcome to Episode 23 of the Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show presented by Duke Cannon! We are at the halfway point in the PLL season. Is Blaze Riorden STILL the best goalie in the league? Are the Archers not as good as we thought they were? The boys fight over the first edition of Pehlke's Power Rankings.
